faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to B.Des at School of Design, MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: To get into School of Design, MRIIRS for the BDes course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. SOD, MRIIRS offers full-time BDes courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid MRNAT exam score. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass graduation with a 50% aggregate.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Faculty of Commerce and Business Studies, Manav rachna?
faqs.answer: ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Standard Charted Bank, Grofers, American Bank and Trust, Kotak Mahindra Bank, CapGemini, Ericsson India, HCL, HP, IBM, Infogain, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Reliance, Wipro, Amazon, ITC, and Infosys are among the top recruiters at the Manav Rachna Faculty of Commerce and Business Studies. The highest package offered to the BCom batch 2022 was INR 9 LPA, according to information on the official website. The Faculty of Commerce and Business Studies has partnered and collaborated with a variety of knowledge partners, including KPMG, ICICI Direct, and the Bombay Stock Exchange Institute, to enhance the relevance of its Business Studies degrees in response to industry demands.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must take the MRNAT exam, which is administered by MRIIRS Deemed-to-be University, in order to be considered for admission to the BSc programme in the Faculty of Architecture and Design. The fundamental requirements for eligibility are that the candidate must have passed the 10+2 exam or its equivalent with a minimum cumulative score of 50% in five subjects—English being a required subject—and four subjects with the highest combined score from an accredited board. The official website will release the MRNAT results. The criteria listed in the entrance brochure will be used to produce the MRNAT merit list. There are numerous things that could affect the minimum marks.

faqs.answer: A:    The MRNAT exam score is accepted by the Manav Rachna Faculty of Architecture and Design. The Manav Rachna Faculty of Architecture and Design offers entrance-based undergraduate and graduate degrees. A valid MRNAT exam score is required for admission to both UG and PG degrees, including BDes, MSc Interior Design, and BSc Interior Design. Faculty of Architecture and Design MRIIRS admission process for BArch is subject to a valid score in NATA, SAT or JEE Main Paper-II. The Manav Rachna Group of Institutions administers the Manav Rachna National Aptitude Test, or MRNAT as it is more often known, for admission to undergraduate and graduate programmes.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Faculty of Architecture and Design, Manav Rachna for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Offering both undergraduate and graduate degrees in the fields of design and architecture, the Faculty of Architecture and Design (FAD) is a department of the MRIIRS (the deemed-to-be University). Students can enroll in the UG and PG degrees at the Faculty of Architecture and Design, including BArch, BSc in Interior Design, BDes, and MSc Interior Design. reviews_list.review_title: It's worth being there. The knowledge of the faculty members is very good with industry guidance.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students got placements. I don't know about packages. The top requirement company is Kedman. 50% of students got internships for roles like junior animation, video creator, etc. It assists through portals and has a proper placement cell, which is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of course is very good. The latest configured PC labs with software are available. A support team is there. Graphic tables, projectors, and everything is there. It has laser cut machines, 3D printers, etc. Everything is there to use and can create things with.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) association with Industry Knowledge Partner - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is absolutely an amazing college.

review_content.Placements: A good amount of placement is conducted in our college. The highest salary package offered is 36 LPA. Top recruiters are Nickelodeon for animation and other great companies for architecture. Out of 100 students, at least 84 students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing on campus. Hostels are great. The hostel has an air-conditioning facility with reasonable fees. The food quality is decent. The canteen is also available for food and drinks. It has a Subway in the college for snacks and a variety of food. It opens at 7 AM and remains open till 11 PM for hostelers.

faqs.answer: In 2023, Manav Rachna's Faculty of Architecture and Design will demand a minimum of marks for M.Sc. degrees that require considerable nuance. M.Sc. Interior Design: This is the premier M.Sc. programme offered by FAD Manav Rachna. According to programme information, applicants must have at least a 55% bachelor's degree in a fine arts, humanities, or design-related field. Although your chances are increased by higher scores, selection may also be influenced by other variables such as admission examinations and portfolios.Extra Master's Programs: Information on other possible M.Sc. programs for 2023 does not appear to be available, such as Product Design or Architecture. For updated information and particular qualifying requirements, consider getting in touch with the FAD admissions office directly if you're interested in them.
faqs.question: Q: What are the minimum marks required for M.Sc at Faculty of Architecture and Design, Manav Rachna 2023?

faqs.answer: Yes, you may attempt to get admission to the Manav Rachna Faculty of Architecture and Design if you received a 60% in your class 12. The candidate must have passed the 10+2 exam or its equivalent with a minimum of 45% overall in five subjects—English being a required subject—and four subjects with the highest combined score from an accredited board. Candidates who fall into one of the following categories: paramilitary forces, sports, wards of defence personnel or single girl children. These candidates may be eligible for an admissions relaxation of up to 5%. Admission to the BSc in Interior Design programme is contingent upon obtaining a valid MRNAT exam score.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission in Faculty of Architecture and Design, Manav Rachna for B.Sc with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: A B.Sc. in Interior Design with 45% from any accredited university or institute is required for admission to the M.Sc. Interior Design programme at the Faculty of Architecture and Design, Manav Rachna. In addition, in order to be admitted to MSc programmes, candidates need to appear for the MRNAT exam administered by MRIIRS Deemed-to-be University. The National Aptitude Test will be followed by the release of the MRNAT results. Each year, the qualifying and minimum scores are subject to change based on various factors. After the results are made public, students can check the admission brochure and wait to hear from the exam authorities.

overview_faqs.answer: BDes full form is a Bachelor of Design which is an undergraduate degree course offered for specialisations like Fashion Design, Interior Design, Accessory Design, Textile Design, and much more. BDes course duration is generally 4 years, which enables students to work in dedicated studio spaces, gather design skills, and learn a wide spectrum of methods and techniques that help refine their expertise. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue BDes course from School of Design, MRIIRS:The course will help the students upgrade their abilities and give them a vision of future challenges. It also gives them immense job growth and opens new avenues for them in several industries such as Fashion Designing, Accessory Designing, Interior Designing, etc.The pass-outs of this programme can work as Fashion Designers, Graphic Designer, UI/UX Designer, Textile Designers, or Product Designers.Students can pursue advanced degrees such as MDes (Master of Design) after BDes. paragraphs: School of Design, MRIIRS admission is open. The college offers BDEs and PhD courses. To get admitted to theSchool of Design, MRIIRS, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. A total of six courses (including specialisation) including PhD in the field of Design. The application process at theSchool of Designis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutSchool of Designcourse admission2024.

SOD courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSchool of Design, MRIIRS courses:
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate

School of Design, MRIIRS admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sankalchand Patel University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Sankalchand Patel University Application Process 2024
The mode of application is online. Aspirants must pass MRNAT entrance exam. However, studnets can also check detailedSOD, MRIIRS feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection
The candidates are selected based on MRNAT entrance exam.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay the Sankalchand Patel University fee to confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Does Faculty of Architecture and Design, Manav Rachna accept MRNAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Manav Rachna Faculty of Architecture and Design accepts the MRNAT score. All undergraduate and graduate programmes at the Manav Rachna Faculty of Architecture and Design are entrance-based. Admission to both UG and PG degrees, including BDes, MSc Interior Design, and BSc Interior Design, is contingent upon obtaining a valid score on the MRNAT exam. For admission to undergraduate and graduate programmes provided at Manav Rachna University and Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Science (MRIIRS), the Manav Rachna Group of Institutions administers the Manav Rachna National Aptitude Test, or MRNAT as it is more often known. Every year, there is an entrance exam at the national level.

reviews.review_heading: It's worth being there. The knowledge of the faculty members is very good with industry guidance.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of course is very good. The latest configured PC labs with software are available. A support team is there. Graphic tables, projectors, and everything is there. It has laser cut machines, 3D printers, etc. Everything is there to use and can create things with.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely an amazing college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing on campus. Hostels are great. The hostel has an air-conditioning facility with reasonable fees. The food quality is decent. The canteen is also available for food and drinks. It has a Subway in the college for snacks and a variety of food. It opens at 7 AM and remains open till 11 PM for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Thus university is best.
reviews.review_text:
There is wifi in the whole camp every student has there own I'd password to access it.
Labs, classrooms all are good and best for students needs.
Talking about hostel it's great coz you get furnished furniture, proper wifi and electricity 24/7 and yes good food too.

course_faqs.question: Does Periyar University follow semester pattern for MBA programme?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, the MBA course at Periyar University follows the semester pattern. Periyar University offers MBA with a two-year course duration where the students complete the coursework in more than one Managemet discipline. There are two semesters in an MBA academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. admission_overview.college_name: Periyar University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Periyar University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Periyar University offers degree, diploma, and certificate courses to candidates at UG, PG and PhD levels. Courses offered are in the streams of Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Business & Management Studies, Education, and Mass Communication & Media. Admission to the courses at Periyar University is merit or entrance-based, depending upon the applied course. It may be noted that the university also offers different UG and PG courses to candidates in distance education mode along with online courses. These courses are offered through the Periyar University Centre for Online and Distance Education (PUCODE).

eligibility_selection.title: Periyar University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Periyar University conducts entrance exams to provide admission to candidates in a majority of UG and PG courses offered by it. The entrance test and admission process are carried out by the respective department of the university. Candidates seeking admission shall first check the eligibility conditions for the course before applying. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for the Periyar University course admissions 2025: Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor’s degree of a minimum of three-year duration with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category students)
courses_table.selection_criteria: TANCET/ MAT/ CAT or Department of Management Studies Entrance Exam + GD + PI

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in the respective subject from Tamilnadu Higher Secondary Board or any equivalent board
BSc or equivalent degree in the respective subjects from any university accepted by the syndicate
Pass Class 10
Masters or PG degree with at least 55% aggregate
Pass Class 12
Pass Class 12

faqs.answer: Students seeking Periyar University admissions must visit the official website and apprise themselves with the relevant information. Students must appear for the entrance exams that are prescribed for the particular course-specialization they are seeking.For example, for admissions into the sought-after MBA courses, students can appear for any of the prominent Management exams like CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, etc. Candidates may visit the official website to know more about other entrance exams like CUET, JEE, etc.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Periyar University?

admission_process.title: Periyar University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: All admissions to Periyar University are entrance-based and merit-based. Most UG, PG and doctoral courses have their own entrance exams. Some also accept state/national-level entrance scores. You can follow the steps below:

Periyar University Application Process 2025Applicants must go to the official site and complete the application form online. The documents required should be uploaded, and the application fee must be paid using the given payment gateway. The filled form should be printed out and saved to be referred to later.
Selection RoundsFor MBA, applicants are considered on the basis of TANCET, MAT, CAT or the Department of Management Studies exam and then GD and PI.

Release and Counselling of Merit ListPeriyar University publishes course-wise merit lists after the selection rounds. The shortlisted candidates have to attend the counselling process by the respective departments. The final seat assignment will be done after the candidates pay thePeriyar University admission feeand verify their documents.
Check out more details in the below video:
lists: BSc, MSc and Diploma are merit or university-based examinations
BCom, BCA, MA and PhD programmes are based on university entrance tests of their own

courses_data.name: Periyar University MSc Admission 2025

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the Periyar University MBA course, candidates are required to fulfil the basic qualification requirements for this course. Those who are willing to get admission to the PG level MBA (General) course at Periyar University must get a UG degree of three years of duration with minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream. There is a relaxation of 5% given to candidates belonging to reserved categories. These candidates are required to pass a UG degree with minimum aggregate of 45%. Furthe

faqs.question: What MBA programmes are offered by Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University provides a two-year full-time MBA programme via its Department of Management. The general MBA and an MBA in Export Management are provided by the university. The programmes are offered at the PG extension centre in Dharmapuri. Industry-relevant learning through AICTE accreditation is ensured by Periyar University.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Admission into MBA in Periyar University is done based on entrance test marks and selection rounds. They should clear TANCET, MAT, CAT, or Periyar University entrance exam. Selected candidates are then further evaluated based on Group Discussions and Personal Interviews. Periyar University makes the final admission into MBA based on overall performance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University asks the candidates to have a minimum bachelor's degree of three years duration. Students should have at least an aggregate of 50%, while reserved category students require 45%. In addition to the eligibility, candidates have to appear for the standardized entrance examinations. Periyar University makes sure that only suitable candidates are admitted to its MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Periyar University?
faqs.answer: The Periyar University admissions are based on applicants' merit, entrance exam score, academic records, fulfilment of eligibility criteria, and seat intake. Candidates are required to meet the course-specific minimum eligibility conditions and the selection criteria as well. Depending upon the applied course, further rounds of admissions are carried out. More details related to the Periyar University admission process are provided below:STEP 1: Periyar University Application Process 2025Candidates must fill an online application form with all the relevant details along with paying an application fee and submit the form at the Head Office of Periyar University.STEP 2: Periyar University Entrance ExamThere are different schools and departments in the university through which the courses are offered. Each department conducts an entrance test for UG/PG course admission. Candidates seeking admission have to appear for the test and score good marks to be eligible to take admission.STEP 3: S

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to Periyar University BSc course?
faqs.answer: No, Periyar University does not accept scores for any entrance exam. There is no entrance exam required for Periyar University BSc admission. The university offers direct admission to all BSc courses. Students can only pursue BSc at Periyar University's affiliated colleges. The selection criteria is common across all the affiliated colleges. For admission to BSc courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Direct admission is offered to such candidates. The university selects candidates based on their merit obtained in Class 12.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Those who get selected for BSc course at Periyar University for the respective specialisations are required to pay the fee at the time of admission. The tuition fee differs for each BSc specialisation. The lowest fee is INR 1,540, while the highest tuition fee is INR 45,000. This fee range contains the tuition fee for all the BSc specialisations offered at Periyar University's affiliated colleges. However, this fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Periyar University BSc fee.

description: Periyar University cutoff 2025 is out for the admission process of its MBA and MCA courses. The university accepts the TANCET entrance exam scores, followed by the counselling process. Students who are seeking admission can refer to the sections below to view the Periyar University TANCET cutoff 2025 across different courses, rounds, and categories. Find further updates below:

Periyar University TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 2436 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

Periyar University MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 2436 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 4026.
After comparing both the categories, the last Round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the OBC AI students.

Periyar University accepts the TANCET cutoff for admissions to various specialisation of MBA/PGDM. Students who are interested in admissions at this institute can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding registration, exam, etc.

TANCET 2025 cutoff for Periyar University is available in the table below, along with last two years cutoff data.The cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students preparing for admission can download the consollidated round and year-wise cutoff data to understand the cutoff trends.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Periyar University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #94 rank in the University category, and #40 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Periyar University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 28th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
Periyar University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Periyar University fell 51 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 38 ranks to #94 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 15 ranks to #40 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

sports.description: With equal emphasis on physical education and sports, the university has a dedicated sports department or complex. The university has a huge space for outdoor activities such as football, cricket, kho-kho, basketball courts (2000 sqm), badminton, etc. The university regularly organises the All India South Zone Level Kabaddi, Volleyball, Football, Basketball, and Handball tournaments. Activities available to students encompass indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, Ludo, yoga and many other worthwhile recreational choices. Besides, it also has a separate gymnasium with professional gym equipment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bharathiyar Arts and Science College for WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is accessed with various resources, but it is not very satisfying.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are enabled with online learning tools for the active participation of students. Libraries are accessed with various digital and offline journals and books. It is also accessed with DELNET. The transport services are provided by them around areas of the district.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vivekanandha College of Arts and Science For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Guidance for MBA discipline in placements scored the least.
reviews.review_text: The college was exclusively built for women students and supported them with lower-fee structures, others were encouraged to join the college considering the safety measures insisted for women. The transport system was enabled with all safety measures and even fitted with GPS tracking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by A.V.S College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good but average.
reviews.review_text: I think it is good compared to government colleges. The hostel is okay, but the food is the worst. The students and friends are very good and calm-minded, and you have to open up with them. Some students can be threatening, but you should not get involved in any type of fight.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sona College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to learn and go.
reviews.review_text: They have a clean and green campus with a peaceful atmosphere. They have compatible sports activities. They have educational and non-educational clubs. The canteen food is good sometimes. The canteen is spacious and has a cool vibe. There is a ground to play. They have CCTV cameras everywhere. They have a safe hostel with an ambience of a home away from home. It is a ragging-free campus. It has an active entrepreneur development cell.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.
reviews.review_text: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shri Sakthikailassh Women's CollegeReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in the Salem district, which is very safe and secure for women.
reviews.review_text: Our college has more labs, Wi-Fi facilities, sports center, libraries, and a clean and neat canteen. The college environment is pleasant and clean, which gives us space. It has a smart class like a projector class and more than three seminar halls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is good for my career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by A.E.T. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 8 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, decent facilities, and manageable academics.
reviews.review_text: A. E. T. Arts & Science College, Salem offers a well-equipped campus with facilities that support both academic and extracurricular activities. The college provides campus-wide Wi-Fi, two dedicated computer centers, two to three laboratories, and a well-stocked library for students' learning needs. Common spaces such as an auditorium, conference hall, and common rooms are available for academic programs and cultural events, while a sports complex and multiple playgrounds encourage physical activ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Thiruvalluvar Government Arts CollegeReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good and it has good value for money.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, but there is no availability of Wi-Fi on the campus. The library is good and has separate libraries for each department, as well as a large common library. The college has four hostels, two for boys and two for girls. The food is not very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group InstitutionsReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned classrooms available for all courses. The infrastructure of the college is fabulous. The quality of the hostels is excellent. They are very clean and have many plants. The mess food is delicious and also hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by SSM College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I was dissatisfied with the infrastructure and the teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was too poor, the building for the BBA was not fully completed, and the interior was not that great. Only the main building was well-maintained, and the building for the BBA course was not completely built. I hope they have fully completed it during the past year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by M.G.R. CollegeReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College for learning and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has good classroom facilities for every student. The college has 2 libraries where we can get many types of books. Also, the college has best labs with good systems for learning. The college has large grounds for 3 colleges for all types of games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Muthayammal College of Arts & ScienceReviewed on 22 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academics, excellent labs, but can improve on campus life and events.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and smart classrooms are available, with high-speed Wi-Fi and smartboards, projectors, and seating. There are more than 5 advanced labs with over 250 computers licensed software like Python, Java, Oracle, MATLAB, and VMware. High-speed LAN & Wi-Fi connectivity is available. Hostel has spacious and well-ventilated rooms on a 2/3 sharing basis, 24/7 water and electricity with backup generators, and high-speed Wi-Fi in the hostel blocks. Wardens and security staff are available aroun...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sri Ganesh College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 18 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College was just for degree.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. The library was available for free for books. The classroom was large. The campus was beautiful and the garden was clean. Limited sports facilities were available. Basic medical facilities were available.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college with the best teaching faculty and placement offices.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the hostel and college are amazing. There is a 24/7 library and good Wi-Fi coverage both in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostel mess and canteen is also better. There is a sports club where students can play any sport they want with the permission of the staff.

reviews.review_heading: KLS Gogte Institute of Technology
reviews.review_text: We have excellent Wi-Fi and lab facilities. Even classes and library management are done very well. Hostel facilities are good. Teachers are  helpful and friendly with the students, which makes it easy for us to approach them and clear our doubts regarding the curriculum.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KLS GIT Belgaum.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for this course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and best teaching. All facilities are very good and also infrastructure is also the best. Quality of facilities available in the hostel is also good. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: College has decent infrastructure and curriculum they make you industry-ready but in previous years.
reviews.review_text: College has small infrastructure and a small campus but basic things are available like dedicated labs for every department and IT building. If we talk about hostels, it is affordable and decent. Many options are there like 3 sharing, 2 sharing, and 1 sharing with balcony rooms are provided hostels are neat and clean. 24/7 Wi-Fi is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are there.
reviews.review_text: Our college is good and maintained clean. All the classrooms and labs are well-developed. They will provide good Wi-Fi facilities. They provide 24/7 library in the hostel. The facilities are good and well-maintained. Mess is also good. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and great labs.
reviews.review_text: The Aeronautical Engineering department generally has well-equipped labs, advanced simulation software, dedicated classrooms and strong Wi-Fi connectivity. Hostels offer decent accommodation with basic medical facilities, good sports infrastructure and nutritious mess food.

reviews.review_heading: This campus is full of stress-free charging stations for electric vehicles.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers both boys’ and girls’ hostels but unfortunately they are currently messy. However our college provides free gym facilities and the quality of the hostel is good. There is free Wi-Fi throughout the campus, which can be accessed through Sophos. Overall, it’s a fantastic college.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of GIT college and hostel!
reviews.review_text: You will get Wi-Fi and RO water facilities on all floors of the boys' hostel and college. The classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors, and each class has conditioned labs. Hostel rooms are shared by three students and are furnished with a bed, a table, and a chair. Each room also has a large locker.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the infrastructure is good, and there is a wide campus area with an.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good and has Wi-Fi connectivity all over the hostel and cameras all over the hostel, but the worst part is the mess; the food is hygienically prepared and has no taste at all; moreover, the dishes are not washed properly either.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with a great placement record and good reputation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like WI-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all very well maintained; the library is huge and students get free books. In the library, there are also computer sensors, a reading room and an e-book centre. Hostel facilities also have good filters set up. It has its own canteen. There are many sports activities there; it has its own football field, basketball court and indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory facilities are available for  the students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for this course was good enough. College management was giving all types of facilities to students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, classrooms etc. At our college. College was also giving hostel facility to the students. Sports facilities were available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Never ending memories are made here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really well and there is a Wi-Fi facility in both the college and hostel, and classrooms are clean every time. The hostel mess provides the best food, which is nutritious and we have a play ground that helps everyone play games at once.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Belgaum for placements and skill oriented learning.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is good. There is a main building for regular classes, CSE, and ISE Aeronautics and mechanical departments are built individually. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The library has all the necessary academic and non-academic books. There are new hostel rooms built recently with a yearly budget of around 33000 rupees. Hostel mess food is average. Sports facilities are available all the time. There is a field on the back side of campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Belgaum, Karnataka .
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure are too good and Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the courses. We have different labs for different classes and the library is too clean and online reading is also available.
Classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of the food is also good and a Wi-Fi facility is also available. Medical facilities, like ambulance clinics, are also available. They balance both sports games and studies.

reviews.review_heading: The information about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are a little bit small. There is proper availability of Wi-Fi connections. The labs are very clean, and the labs have modern equipment. There are lots of books in our college library, and our library has research papers. The food provided in the hostel is not so good.

paragraphs: Yes, KLS Gogte Institute of Technology Belagavi does refund fees, but the institute has particular regulations. Refund rules are typically based on the course, other institutional guidelines, and the date of withdrawal. It is preferable to refer to the institute's official refund policy or get in touch with the admissions office directly for more information if you want to know the precise terms for fee refunds.

The total tuition fee for the two-year Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at KLS Gogte Institute of Technology in Belagavi is INR 116,940. Admission is based on a minimum graduation score of 50% and accepts the KMAT exam. The programme has 120 seats.

The application fee for the Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) programme at KLS Gogte Institute of Technology in Belagavi is not specified, but the total tuition fee for the course is INR 4,82,870. To be eligible for admission to the B.Arch. program, applicants must have scored at least 50% in 12th grade. The programme offers admission to 80 students.

There's no Application fees for applying in the M.Tech course at KLS Gogte Institute of technology. The students can apply online through the institute's website and the final admission is based on the total merit score achieved by the individual.

highlights.summary:
GAT (online) 2024 will be held on Feb 10, 2024, and the admit card will be released on Feb 9, 2024. Further, the result will be declared on Feb 12, 2024

JD Institute of Fashion Technology, founded in 1988, is one of India's oldest and most prestigious art and design schools. In India, there are 38 campuses. Cumulus, the Indo-Italian Chamber of Commerce and Industry, the Indo-French Chamber of Commerce and Industry, the Council of EU Chambers of Business in India, and EQAC (Education quality accreditation Commission, Spain) are a few examples of which JD Institute of Fashion Technology is associated to Adobe, the Institute of Indian Interior Designers (IIID), and the Association of Designers of India (ADI) are all creative partners of JD Institute of Fashion Technology. 'UK Asian Business Award,' 'Best Vocational Education Institute of the Year-Fashion Design,' 'International Glory Award for the Best Design Institution,' 'Best Skill Learning for Fashion Design in India at the Indian Education Awards 2018,' and many more have been bestowed upon the institute.

The Institute provides a variety of courses in the fields of Fashion Design, Interior Design, Jewellery Design, Fashion Business Management and Visual Merchandising, among others, at the diploma, advance diploma, UG diploma levels and PG diploma levels. A few of the highlights of JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar are as below:

Some of the important dates regarding JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar Admission are given below:

JD Institute of Fashion Technology in Kamla Nagar offers a variety of undergraduate, diploma, advance diploma and postgraduate courses. The following are some of the highlights of the admissions process:

Each Diploma specialisation in Design and Fashion at JD Institute of Fashion Technology has a maximum intake of 25 students.

JD Institute of Fashion Technology provides a variety of programs including Fashion Design, Interior Design, Jewellery Design, Visual Merchandising, Fashion and Business Management among others. A few of the most popular courses, along with their eligibility requirements, are given below:

The placement cell at JD Institute is quite active, and it is in charge of finding students profitable career prospects. Over the years, they have maintained a placement rate of 99.9%. The JD Institute of Fashion Technology's highlights are listed below.

From August to October, third-year undergraduate students participate in internships. For their internships, students can choose from luxury design, modern couture, women's RTW, men's RTW, children's fashion, lingerie, specialist wear, and costume design.

placements.overview:
JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar - Corporate Extension Centre is a private institute. JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar - Corporate Extension Centre offers a total of 31 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 6 specialisations such as Apparel Design, Fashion Design, Jewellery Design, Makeup & Beautician and Textile Design. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.Sc., B.Des, After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma and UG Diploma in Full Time mode. JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar - Corporate Extension Centre fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 28,780 to 9,31,000. JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Kamla Nagar - Corporate Extension Centre has an annual seat intake of 1005 for all the programmes. college_info.college_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences

highlights.summary:
Situated in Indore, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences (BRAUSS) is a state university which was established in 2016 by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. It is recognised as the first ‘University of Social Sciences’ in the country and has gained approval from the University Grants Commission (UGC) and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

It offers five courses at UG, PG and doctoral level in the field of Arts & Humanities, Business & Social Sciences, Language & Cultural, Medicine & Health, Engineering, Science & Technology, among others. These courses are offered and managed by five schools that are an integral part of this University. These include School of Dr. Ambedkar's Thoughts & Philosophy, School of Social Sciences & Management Studies, School of Agriculture and Rural Development, School of Education and Skill Development and School of Law & Social Justice.

The procedure to apply for BRAUSS admission 2021 is conducted in both online as well as offline modes. Candidates seeking admissions to various programmes offered by Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences must qualify certain criteria as detailed below:

Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences offers in total of five courses at UG, PG and doctoral level. These include a three-year BA programme at UG level along with two-year MSc and MA (in 22 streams) programmes at PG level. It also offers two-year MPhil course in 12 specialisations and PhD course across 17 specialisations at research level.

Key specialisations covered across all courses include Arts & Humanities, Business & Social Sciences, Language & Cultural, Medicine & Health, Engineering and Science & Technology. The table below presents some of the popular BRAUSS courses along with their eligibility criteria and fee structure:

BRAUSS scholarships are offered to both academically-bright and economically-weak students. The scholarships are disbursed under the name of Award of Fellowship and Scholarship and Chancellor’s Fellowships.

Note: Check out the University website for more information on scholarships offered and their respective eligibility criteria.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our university provides good facilities and education at very low fees.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is very low at our university.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is very good and clean with separate buildings for every course. Hostel facility is available in our university which is calm and noise free. Sports and various programs are held in our university. Many VIPs are invited to our university.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our university are very helpful, guide students, and qualified with Ph.D. The course curriculum is relevant and makes students industry-ready but does not have practicals. Exams are not tough. Bright students can easily score good marks and an average student can easily pass. The pass SGPA is 5.

paragraphs: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Dr. B.R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciencesoffers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include B.Lib.I.Sc., B.Sc., MSW and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,594 - 1,21,560. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 6 months - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

highlights.summary: SJCC Changanacherry admission 2024 is open. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the college. As per the NIRF report 2024 released by St Joseph College of Communication, the median package offered during UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively. Further, a total of 144 students were placed out of total 192 students during UG 3-year placements 2023.

placements.overview: St. Joseph College of Communication offers placement assistance to students. The key highlights related to St. Joseph College of Communication placements are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    SJCC has not released course-specific placement data. However, the NIRF report 2024 is available on the official website of the college. As per the NIRF report 2024,  the median package offered during (UG 3-year) placements in 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA. 144 students were placed out of a total of 192 students during SJCC's UG (3-year) placements 2023. The UG (3-year) courses offered at the college are BA and BCom. The students who reviewed the college on Shiksha.com rated the college's pla
faqs.question: Is SJCC good for BA placements?

faqs.answer: A:    SJCC offers a BCom in Finance and Taxation through its department of Commerce. After pursuing BCom at SJCC, graduates can build a career as an Auditor,  Cost Accountant,  Income Tax Officer,  Tax Consultant,  Budget Analyst,  Finance Manager,  Accountant, GST Consultant, etc. They can also join the sectors of education, banking and other financial services. Graduates can also pursue a PG programme like MCom, MBA, CA, CS, etc.
faqs.question: What is the scope of career for a BCom graduate of SJCC?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, SJCC has a dedicated placement cell to provide employment opportunities to its students. The college's career placement office facilitates visits from several multinational companies. Some of these companies are Infosys, TCS, Atees Infomedia Pvt Ltd, Karikku, AsiaNet News, Hexagon Hyderabad, Times of India, etc. As per the NIRF report 2024 released by St. Joseph College of Communication (SJCC), the median package offered during UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements in 2023 stood at INR 3
faqs.question: Does SJCC provide placement support to its students?

faqs.answer: A:    The placements for BCom graduates at SJCC are handled through a common placement cell of the college. The college has not released the placement data specific to the BCom programme. However, the NIRF report 2024 is available on the official website of the college. review_summary.college_name: St. Joseph College of Communication Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Animation and Visual Effects - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: St. Joseph College of Communication review.

content.Placements: Most students who use the placement cell to find a job do get placed. While the salary package may not be the best, at least we do find a job. The companies that come to the placement cell are mid-tier, and students are responsible for finding their own internships, which typically last one month.
content.Infrastructure: St. Joseph College of Communication does not provide hostels for women, but they do provide hostels for men. The men's hostel seems good, but students are subject to a curfew and the food is only average. However, students do get nonveg regularly. There is a small field to play on, but games are rare.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Animation and Visual Effects - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Great college where you can bring cartoons to life.

content.Placements: There are placements conducted on the campus during the final year on a specified date; you can choose to attend only if you want to, or you can find it on your own too. Around 20 percent of students opt for it. The lowest package is 180,000 rupees, the highest package is 420,000 rupees, and the average package is 300,000 rupees. Internships are compulsory in the 4th semester, so all the students have to do it. Roles offered for jobs are 3D designer, 3D artist, background artist, 2D animator, rigger, and VFX artist.
content.Infrastructure: Campus life is quite fulfilling as there are different clubs and events you can participate in. All facilities and infrastructure are available and free to use, and everything is included in the fees. There is a library with a good range of books, and every classroom has whiteboards and projectors for theory and practical classes. Wi-Fi is available for students to use for free in classrooms. The quality of the hostel is very good as the rooms are large and spacious, and double bunk beds are available for an aesthetic room. There is a huge ground outside the hostel for a fresh game, and gyms and good hotels are also available nearby outside hostel premises. The food is really good; you even get non-veg once or twice a week, and they provide fish every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Animation and Graphic Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: This course is very helpful for students who are interested in animation and design. Students will get internships in good companies during their academic year. Placements are also available at the college. Most of the students will get placements. This course ensures the career of students.
content.Infrastructure: We got good infrastructure and facilities in the college. We have 2D labs, stop-motion labs, recording studios, green matte studios, radio stations, etc. The canteen is also available in the college. The college library is very useful for students. There are many books related to media and media studies. So it will also help students to develop their skills and creativity.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Animation and Graphic Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Strong infrastructure and facilities, but faculty quality lacks consistency.

content.Placements: Approximately 60 to 70% of the students were placed in the course. Apparently, the highest package is 1.5 lakhs and the lowest is 40 thousand. Top recruiters are Google , OLX, Amazon and Microsoft. Around 70 to 80 % of students secured their internships. Common roles like web developer , product designer, UI designer, etc. are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and studios are well equipped for providing a good environment for studies and works. We have an issue with the wifi they provide; that's a huge fault by the college; they should improve it. Telling about the hostel, the food is average and the rooms are also average.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Animation and Visual Effects - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It’s satisfactory because of the facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Everyone had to do internships; it’s a must to gain experience. Our campus placement program is pretty fine. Last year, we got placements from Flipkart, Karik Studio, and many other companies. The packages varied for individuals based on their performance, but overall, it was good.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are pretty good; we have plugboards everywhere. Our library has very valuable books and e-books. We only have a boys' hostel for now, but it's pretty good. Our stop-motion lab is excellent; it is all very new, and we have four or five audio labs. The cameras and everything are always available.

admission_overview.college_name: St. Joseph College of Communication Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee and Seats

admission_process.title: SJCC Changanacherry Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SJCC Changanacherry admission 2025is entirely merit-based. The college considers the merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam for admission.SJCCoffers courses at UG and PG levels Arts and Commerce streams. Besides, the college also offers diploma and add-on courses. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online.
The college accepts the scores in qualifying examinations to offer admission in BA, BCom and MA programmes. Find below the key highlights forSt Joseph College of Communication admission:

St Joseph College of Communication admission is based on marks obtained by candidates in the qualifying examination. A minimum Class 12 score is required for UG admission and a UG degree is required for admission to postgraduate programme. Given below is the list ofSt Joseph College of Communication coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

St Joseph College of Communication charges different fees for both the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. SJCC Fees include various components such as tuition fees, application fees and hostel charges. Given below is the tabular representation ofSt Joseph College of Communication fees:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SJCC Changanacherry admission 2025is merit-based Candidates who want to seek admission to any programme offered at SJCC must apply for Centralised Allotment Process (CAP) on Mahatma Gandhi University website. The college also offers admission under the Management Quota. Given below is the admission process forSt Joseph College of Communication courses:
STEP 1: SJCC Changanacherry Application Process 2025

Candidates who want to take admitted at St Joseph College of Communication must apply for a centralised allotment process on the Mahatma Gandhi University's website: cap.mgu.ac.in. Candidates must register for fresh admission on the website ofMahatma Gandhi University, provide all the necessary details, upload documents, select college and programme preference and pay the application fees.
STEP 2: Selection

St Joseph College of Communication admission to the UG programme is entirely based on marks obtained by candidates in the Class 12 examination (admission to the BA programme through Management Quota is based on the marks obtained in the qualifying examination, performance in the Aptitude Test and Interview conducted by the college). The score in graduation is considered for MA admission.
STEP 3: Counselling and Seat Allotment

The university then releases the merit list based on marks obtained by candidates in the qualifying examination and the preference filled by them in the St Joseph College of Communication application form. Further, candidates must report to the college for document verification and fee payment. SJCC authorities after verifying the digital copies of the documents provided online and may admit or reject the admission.

placement_data.title: St Joseph College of Communication Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by St Joseph College of Communication, the median package offered during UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 144 students were placed out of total 192 students during UG 3-year placements 2023. Earlier, some of the top recruiters who participated during past year's placements are available on the official website. The leading recruiters who participated in St. Joseph College of Communication during placements were Infosys, TCS, Karikku, Fertile Isle, Csharks, Awesome Daddies, RR Donnelley, etc.

faqs.question: Is SJCC good for BA placements?
faqs.answer: SJCC has not released course-specific placement data. However, the NIRF report 2024 is available on the official website of the college. As per the NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during (UG 3-year) placements in 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA . 144 students were placed out of a total of 192 students during SJCC's UG (3-year) placements 2023 . The UG (3-year) courses offered at the college are BA and BCom. The students who reviewed the college on Shiksha.com rated the college's placements at 3.1/5. The placements and salary package vary across the different BA courses/specialisations.

faqs.question: Does SJCC provide placement support to its students?
faqs.answer: Yes, SJCC has a dedicated placement cell to provide employment opportunities to its students. The college's career placement office facilitates visits from several multinational companies. Some of these companies are Infosys, TCS, Atees Infomedia Pvt Ltd, Karikku, AsiaNet News, Hexagon Hyderabad, Times of India, etc. As per the NIRF report 2024 released by St. Joseph College of Communication (SJCC), the median package offered during UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements in 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are the placements for BCom graduates at St. Joseph College of Communication?
faqs.answer: The placements for BCom graduates at SJCC are handled through a common placement cell of the college. The college has not released the placement data specific to the BCom programme. However, the NIRF report 2024 is available on the official website of the college. As per the report, the median package offered during UG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.09 LPA . 144 students were placed out of a total of 192 students across various UG 3-year courses (BA/BCom) in 2023. The top recruiters who participated in SJCC placements were Infosys, TCS, Karikku, Fertile Isle, Csharks, Awesome Daddies, RR Donnelley, etc.

faqs.question: What is the scope of career for a BCom graduate of SJCC?
faqs.answer: SJCC offers a BCom in Finance and Taxation through its department of Commerce. After pursuing BCom at SJCC, graduates can build a career as an Auditor, Cost Accountant, Income Tax Officer, Tax Consultant, Budget Analyst, Finance Manager, Accountant, GST Consultant, etc. They can also join the sectors of education, banking and other financial services. Graduates can also pursue a PG programme like MCom , MBA, CA, CS, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: St. Joseph College of Communication Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: St. Joseph College of Communication review.
reviews.review_text: St. Joseph College of Communication does not provide hostels for women, but they do provide hostels for men. The men's hostel seems good, but students are subject to a curfew and the food is only average. However, students do get nonveg regularly. There is a small field to play on, but games are rare.

reviews.review_heading: Great college where you can bring cartoons to life.
reviews.review_text: Campus life is quite fulfilling as there are different clubs and events you can participate in. All facilities and infrastructure are available and free to use, and everything is included in the fees. There is a library with a good range of books, and every classroom has whiteboards and projectors for theory and practical classes. Wi-Fi is available for students to use for free in classrooms. The quality of the hostel is very good as the rooms are large and spacious, and double bunk beds are ava...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
We got good infrastructure and facilities in the college. We have 2D labs, stop-motion labs, recording studios, green matte studios, radio stations, etc.
The canteen is also available in the college. The college library is very useful for students. There are many books related to media and media studies. So it will also help students to develop their skills and creativity.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and facilities, but faculty quality lacks consistency.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms, labs, and studios are well equipped for providing a good environment for studies and works. 
We have an issue with the wifi they provide; that's a huge fault by the college; they should improve it. 
Telling about the hostel, the food is average and the rooms are also average.

reviews.review_heading: It’s satisfactory because of the facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are pretty good; we have plugboards everywhere. Our library has very valuable books and e-books. We only have a boys' hostel for now, but it's pretty good. Our stop-motion lab is excellent; it is all very new, and we have four or five audio labs. The cameras and everything are always available.

reviews.review_heading: I am really enjoying the campus and it's worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and libraries are provided for students to learn and enjoy the process. Teachers are all friendly and supportive. The college campus environment is too good. The students are also friendly in this college, and they also support each other for leveling up in our own respective fields.

reviews.review_heading: Well, it gives us a good college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top class, and the hostel is great. They took us on a tour and showed us the infrastructure, which is pretty good. They have their own radio, YouTube channel, and work with movies too. The programs there are impressive as they invite high-level guests from the fields of movies and music.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with management and faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. We have studio laboratories and green screens studios. The equipment quality is not good. The food served in the hostel is also not good. We do not even get a chance to use laboratories frequently. Hostel rules are very strict.

reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Joseph College of Communication.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs were good. The hostel facility was good, but the food was average. Medical facilities were good. Sports and games were available, but the ground was average. There was no Wi-Fi. The food at the canteen was average. There was a football field.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good infrastructure for the course. Good equipment and Studios are available for Projects and exams. The hostels have reasonable accommodation and food. The Hostel is inside the college campus itself so, you can use the studios late.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. You must know this is a media college and therefore it has a comparatively small campus. But we have more than enough facilities to study here. We have a Dolby studio, a community radio station,  2d,  3d labs and Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities is also available for male students.

reviews.review_heading: It has pathetic management.
reviews.review_text: It is easy to spot the campus from the main road. It has 3 entrances. Hostel & canteen facilities are offered for male students (as of now), it's accurate on google maps. House/room rentals are available nearby places, and it is not situated in the flood-affected area. Overall it has a good experience.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but a bit disappointed with the hostel infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Animation and multimedia departments have separate buildings, which takes away the feel of a campus. The digital library and the computer labs couldn't offer the latest advancements. Cameras and equipment are up to date. Hostels are good, but too strict rather being in a media college. Quality of food is good. The college needs a lot of improvement, but it seems as they do not consider improvements.

reviews.review_heading: The best media college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Expensive and updated equipment are available for practice. A camera such as Sony fs7 is the top expensive camera. Hxr, PMW and old television camera is also available there. You will get full freedom to use those and the studio floor, and recording studios are very upgraded. Those are the benefits which are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: My life at St. Joseph College Of Communication.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is excellent with almost all the facilities provided by authorities. Al the facilities including 2D labs, DSLR cameras are available at request and also good classroom with Wi-Fi and power plugs for almost each student in the classroom.
The college has a widespread campus including a canteen. Also, it is located at the centre of town.
There won't be any struggle to get things you needed in and around the campus.

college_info.intro:
CGC University offers courses at UG and PG levels. BTech, BSc and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university. The university offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The university cover core courses in the areas of HR, Marketing, Finance, Operation Management, Business Analytics and Digital Marketing.
CGC University offers a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including CSE, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Block Chain Technology, Cloud Computing, Robotics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. CGC University courses enhances learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check below the popular courses offered at CGC University:
Check the video below:

placements.overview:
CGC University Mohali has introduced Capgemini CodeXperience Centre for all BTech CSE and ECE students. It is a Global Capability Centre established exclusively for Capgemini placements. The center is structured and industry-integrated learning facility is provided to students on campus.

It is Capgemini’s one and only lab in North India. It will provide training to students for placements and hire more than 500 students every year. The training is based on Capgemini’s own syllabus that is designed as per global-skill requirements. There is an opportunity for students to get hired by Capgemini and more than 10 other partner companies through this training program.

CGC University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The offered stood at . The student of the secured this package. More than visited the campus for placements and job offered over students. Some of the top recruiters of CGC University placements in 2025 include Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.

review_content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed, and the highest package of 2026 is 87 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. All the big companies come to our college. On December 23rd, there was a placement day where all 4th-year students celebrated their placements. All facilities were also enjoyed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.

review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.
review_content.Faculty: My course has more practical work, and it is the exposure given to me for getting a job in the private sector. The college is also providing the dcpd department, which helps us to crack the job. Apart from that, we attend workshops and industries, which help us to see the practical work.

overview_faqs.question: How much does it cost to pursue the BCom (H) programme offered by CGC University?
overview_faqs.answer: Total cost of BCom (H) programme offered by CGC University includes several charges like fee components, tuition fees, hostel charges, and one-time payment. As per the official website, total tuition fee for BCom (H) is around INR 93,000. Students who choose on-campus accommodation must pay hostel fees that depends on their room type. review_summary.college_name: CGC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cyber Security - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Admission to the university is highly recommended.

content.Placements: The placement drive CGC University offers a high rate of recruitment (86 percent). Big industries like Amazon, IBM, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Adobe visit the campus and hire the best talent of the university. The average package offered to students is 12 LPA, and the highest package offered is 50 LPA. The average internship rate is 84 percent in various tech companies like Adobe, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. The canteen serves hygienic and nutritious food. It offers 24x7 medical help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placement, AI-driven.

content.Placements: We have a very high placement rate in our college. Our seniors have got jobs within and even out of the campus with more than 30 LPA. Even more than 50 companies visit the campus with the best offers to the students. The future is in safe hands.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.

content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed, and the highest package of 2026 is 87 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. All the big companies come to our college. On December 23rd, there was a placement day where all 4th-year students celebrated their placements. All facilities were also enjoyed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.

content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.
content.Faculty: My course has more practical work, and it is the exposure given to me for getting a job in the private sector. The college is also providing the dcpd department, which helps us to crack the job. Apart from that, we attend workshops and industries, which help us to see the practical work.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.

content.Placements: Excellent and good packages offered by the college, including placements with top recruiting companies for every particular courses and along with this, they offer good roles. Approximately 80% of students succeed in taking internship from the companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

admission_overview.title: CGC University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: CGC University admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. The applications at the university are conducted in both online and offline modes.. CGC University offers over 100+ courses at UG and PG levels in streams, such as Animation, Law, Design etc. through its various institutes. CGC University offers full-time courses across various specialisations, such as Biotechnology and HR among others.

eligibility_selection.title: CGC University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: CGC University course admissions are subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteira. The CGCUET is the main way to get admission to the university. For Engineering courses, the exam is mandatory. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The basic eligibility is as below: The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular CGC University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics & Mathematics as mandatory subjects and any one of the following subjects - Chemistry/ CS/ Electronics/ IT/ Biology/ IP/ Biotech/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies with a minimum aggregate of 60% (55% aggregate for reserved category)

BTech or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% aggregate fo reserved category)
Class 12 in any stream
Graduation with 50% aggregate

faqs.answer: CGC University eligibility require students to complete the last qualifying exam. faqs.question: Who is eligible for CGC University admission?

faqs.answer: CGC University shortlists students based on academic merit, entrance exam scores (if applicable), and the number of seats available for each course. The university conducts CGCUET as an entrance-cum-scholarship test. The selection process for each course can be found at the CGC University website.
faqs.question: How does CGC University shortlist students?

faqs.answer: Yes, an average student may get admission in CGC University. The university offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes. Students have to appear for the CGCUET to get admission and scholarships. Since the seats are limited and the competition is high, students have to prepare well in advance. With the right planning, students can join the university.
