admission_process.title: CGC University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: CGC University has a dedicated admission cell to assist the admission process. The objective of this cell is to guide potential students in making the selection from the different courses available at the university. Follow the steps forCGC University admission processgiven below:
Application Process
Interested students can register themselves at the CGC University website by submitting an application form. The form has to be submitted with required documents and an application fees.

The selection of a student for a particular course depends on the profile. Aspirants need to have a qualifying score in the minimum qualification required to be admitted to a course. Several aspects are taken into account to selecting a student, including:

Students are advised to check the information related to the respective to take admission. This can be done by purchasing the prospectus either online or offline. After initial registration, a student is required to pay the complete fee within one week of registration or one week after the announcement of final results. The seat of the student will be confirmed only after the complete fee has been deposited and the qualifying exam is cleared by the student. Information related to the commencement of classes and other details can be had from the admission cell or will be mailed individually.

placement_report.college_name: CGC University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC University Mohali has introduced Capgemini CodeXperience Centre for all BTech CSE and ECE students . It is a Global Capability Centre established exclusively for Capgemini placements . Through this Centre, structured and industry-integrated learning facility is provided to students on campus.

It is Capgemini’s one and only lab in North India. It will provide training to students for placements and hire more than 500 students every year. The training is based on Capgemini’s own syllabus that is designed as per global-skill requirements. There is an opportunity for students to get hired by Capgemini and more than 10 other partner companies through this training program.

CGC University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The highest package offered stood at INR 1 Cr per annum . The student of the BTech CSE batch secured this package. 9 companies offered the package of INR 50 LPA to the batch 2025. More than 1005 recruiters visited the campus and placed 1361 students with good packages. The overall average salary secured by the batch 2025 was INR 6.34 LPA . The highest and average salaries offered to the MBA batch was INR 27 LPA and INR 9.5 LPA . The students of the BCA batch secured the highest salary of INR 33 LPA and the average salary of INR 9 LPA . The MCA batch secured the average salary of INR 10 LPA and the highest salary of INR 25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of CG University in 2025 include Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.

faqs.question: Does CGC University really offer 100% placements with good average salaries?
faqs.answer: CGC University offers 100% placement assistance to all of its students. Recently, CGC University offered an average package of INR 12 LPA to the students of the BTech CSE batch 2025. The course wise CGC University average package offered during the 2025 placement drive is presented below: Course Average Package (2025) BTech (CSE /AIDS/AIML) INR 12 LPA BTech (Civil /ME/ECE) INR 6.4 LPA MBA INR 9.5 LPA BBA INR 8 LPA BCA INR 9 LPA Bcom/Mcom INR 7 LPA Paramedical (BSC) INR 7 LPA BSC in Fashion Design INR 7 LPA LAW INR 7 LPA BSC in Graphic Design & Multimedia INR 6.5 LPA BSC in IT & Cybersecurity INR 6 LPA BAJMC INR 6.5 LPA MCA INR 10 LPA BSC in Nutrition & Dietics INR 6 LPA

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of CGC University placements?
faqs.answer: The University attracted various recruiters for its 2025 placement session who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. The top recruiters of CGC University in 2025 included Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors and offered new-age job profiles.

outlook.description:
CGC University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, CGC University climbed 7 ranks to #112 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, CGC University climbed 2 ranks to #52 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the CGC University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

hostel.description: Hostels are provided with the facilities such as air cooler in each room, arrangement for 24 hours uninterrupted power supply through govt, power supply, and college generators, internet connectivity through wi-fi system, hot water in winters and RO purified drinking water, facilities for indoor and outdoor games, 24 x 7 medical dispensary with ambulance etc, 24 hours security,laundry facility (optional on payment basis),tuck shops to cater to daily needs of the students,newspapers and magazines and a well-equipped gym in each hostel.

library.description: The institute has a computerized library with well-set equipment and modern day technology to encourage research activities and advanced reading. The library is stocked with numerous books authored by experts on the subject and subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional.The library subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional dailies to keep the students in touch with their fields of interest. The library is well furnished and can seat more than 100 students at a time in the spacious reading hall. The peaceful atmosphere in the library plays a major role in helping students concentrate and study better.  Apart from books, the library has a good collection of Audio video material, NPTEL, CDs & DVDs. The library has a separate “Book Bank” exclusively for the high flyers. Institute has E-Library and Journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis, Handball Ground, Track and Field Ground

It is well maintained with an efficient service and take away counter. It serves a variety of dishes at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Admission to the university is highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. T...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, AI-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good and supportive. Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best in the surrounding area. The college has separate buildings for separate departments, and each building has more than 10 blocks. Apart from that, classrooms are ventilated and spacious. However, we are facing some problems.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and still improving.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has Wi-Fi facilities, and it is one of the best facilities for students. It helps us in our studies. There are games and entertainment. There is a digital app that gives us practical knowledge. Classrooms are ventilated, big, and spacious. Seats are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good teachers and understanding and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available and infrastructure is good, lab contains perfectly functioning computer systems. I live nearby, so I do not know about the hostel facilities.  It is decent. Despensory is present in the college for any medical issue.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. It is usually clean. Hostels are clean and very accommodating. Plenty of food places are available. There are sports grounds for games like football, basketball, etc. Sports that take place are always refreshing and amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Students get a balanced college experience at CGC University, Mohali.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University, Mohali is great and well maintained. Classrooms and labs are well equipped. Washrooms are properly cleaned, which makes the daily college life comfortable. Most of the facilities needed by the students are easily available. Hostel facilities are decent and safe. Basic amenities like water coolers, electricity, 24x7 Wi-Fi and security are available. The mess food is average but manageable. Overall, the hostel environment is good for studying and living. It fe...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and I recommend it to my friends and juniors for enrollment.
reviews.review_text: Everything is very good. Food is tasty. Safety and security are provided. Four meals are provided daily. Food is on time without delay. Rooms are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Decent private university.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with a clean, modern campus. Classrooms, labs, library, hostels, Wi-Fi, and sports facilities are well maintained. The campus environment is lively and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is very good, safe, secure, and educational institution.
reviews.review_text: The library in our college is very big and spacious and it is well-ventilated. There are more than 5000 physical books available, and digital libraries also level a part from that. There is a day and night facility for Wi-Fi but sometimes it goes very slow due to the use of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement, and enjoyable campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure for our course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with projectors. Labs are well maintained with updated systems and required software. Campus Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average at times. Library is large, well organized, and has sufficient books and digital resources for students.

reviews.review_heading: It provides better career opportunities with overall development from sports to practical skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a smart classroom with Wi-Fi available to us by the university, and our department provides us with labs that have proper software to work with. We also have a library where we can get every type of book, as well as an online facility.

highlights.summary: Admission is open to all courses for the academic year 2025-26. Interested candidates can check and apply through the official website of the university.

college_info.intro: Rabindranath Tagore University courses include UG, PG, PhD, UG Diploma, PG Diploma in streams such as Agriculture, Humanities and Languages, Commerce, Education, Engineering and Technology, Law, Management, Medical Science, Science etc. The University offers BSc, MBA and UG Diploma with various specialisations in full-time mode. Ravindranath University Bhopal BSc is available in Nursing, Agriculture, Forensic Science, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Microbiology, Yoga etc. Similarly, RNTU MBA/ PGDM is offerered in Rural Development, Urban Management, Rural Management, Hospital Administration etc. The University gives admission on the basis of Class 12 qualification with 45% minimum aggregate. Majority of courses consider the AJEE scores or the scores/ percentile of NEET, CAT/ MAT or other respective entrance exams. This is payable in equal yearly instalments of INR 1 Lacs (per year). In addition to the course fee, candidates may have tro submit certain other fees, such as hostel fees, security deposits, admission fees, etc. Eligible candidates can also get a scholarship to reduce their fee burden. reviews_list.review_title: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.

review_content.Placements: Of course, RNTU is one of the best, but I don't think it has the highest chance of placement. Fastly, but placement and internship from our college are actually given, and the percentage of students who got internships is 80-90%. Overall, a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are also very good. Overall, in all departments, approximately 80% of students get placed. The lowest salary package in the B.E. CSE course ranges from 5-7 LPA. The highest package is 1.5 crores per annum in B.E. CSE. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Google, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. review_summary.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty in this college is also good, who teach well and tell the students to stay understanding.

content.Placements: Nice university in Bhopal. Known for its academic excellence and holistic approach. Very nice university in placement. There are many students in our college who are preparing for different courses. Recruiting for AWS, Atos global, Aisect limited, Agromaxx.
content.Infrastructure: Nice hostel and good food.
content.Faculty: Teachers at RNTU are helpful and qualified. Their teaching quality is good with a focus on practical. The course curriculum is relevant and industry-oriented. Semester exams are moderately difficult with a high pass percentage. My university is best. Rabindranath Tagore University, Bhopal, is India's first skill-based university with equal focus on both theoretical and practical learning. Keeping this in mind, the university management has established practical laboratories for all the courses that are conducted in every department.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of RNTU Bhopal academics, campus, and beyond.

content.Placements: Placements at RNTU Bhopal for the 2024-25 batch were quite impressive. 85% of students got placed with a package of 15 LPA. The university provides strong internship opportunities. Students get more than 400 internships in top companies. Overall, RNTU offers a good balance of academics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available. RNTU Bhopal provides good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good labs, and a rich library for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.

content.Placements: Of course, RNTU is one of the best, but I don't think it has the highest chance of placement. Fastly, but placement and internship from our college are actually given, and the percentage of students who got internships is 80-90%. Overall, a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.

content.Placements: Placements are also very good. Overall, in all departments, approximately 80% of students get placed. The lowest salary package in the B.E. CSE course ranges from 5-7 LPA. The highest package is 1.5 crores per annum in B.E. CSE. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Google, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. There are several facilities for students like a gym, library, cricket or football ground, basketball court, badminton court, libraries, etc., and useful facilities are all included.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average university only for degrees, not for studies.

content.Placements: In Rabindranath Tagore University, there are not much placements. But for sure there is a lot of support and effort put in by placement cells to get students placed especially in engineering and computer science. Companies like Tata, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc., visit every year for placements and the average CTC is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine except for network issues. University campus provides hostel guest house, canteen, auditorium, etc. The infrastructure is very good. The main problem is that it is not in Bhopal, it is in Raise. Take admission after knowing all the details.

admission_overview.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date, Fee

admission_overview.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025 is open. The university offers an online mode of application submission. Admission to all the courses at the university is offered basis of the entrance exam scores. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the university. Given below is more updated information about Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025, followed by course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

eligibility_selection.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Rabindranath Tagore University course admission is mainly entrance-based. The university offers a wide range of courses in full-time mode. The basic eligibility for all the UG, PG, and doctoral programmes at RNTU Bhopal is merit in the last qualifying examination. However, the selection of candidates for all the courses is basis the scores obtained by the candidates in the AISECT Joint Entrance Exam (AJEE), a university-level entrance exam. Besides this, the university may also accept the scores of national and state-level entrance exams for MBA. The table below lists the popular Rabindranath Tagore University courses along with their admission-related details like eligibility, accepted entrance exams, and fee:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved categories) in the Science stream
Class 12 in a relevant stream
BSc with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
LLB with 55% aggregate
PG degree with a minimum aggregate of 55% in a relevant field from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: PhD Entrance Test/ NET/ GATE/ SLET

faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University, shortlists students mainly based on entrance scores. The university accepts valid score secured in the AJEE conducted by AISECT Group of Institutions. It is an in-house test conducted by the GOI for admission to all five of its universities. However, students may get admitted on a merit basis. To know about the RNTU Bhopal admission chances, students can connect with the admission desk of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get into Rabindranath Tagore University without entrance exam?

admission_process.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission  Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission process of Rabindranath Tagore University starts with filling out the registration form. Candidates willing for admission to Rabindranath Tagore University courses must appear for the accepted entrance exam. The step-wise Rabindranath Tagore University admission process 2025 are below:
Application Process
For admission to various programme offered by Rabindranath Tagore University, candidates must fill out the admission form online by going through the official website of the university.
Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates must pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses with 45% aggregate and a graduation degree with 50% aggregate for admission to PG. Also, candidates must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list based on their performance in the entrance exam.
Final Seat Allotment
The university release a list of shortlisted candidates. To confirm the seats, students are supoose to pay the required fees.

courses_data.name: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Rabindranath Tagore University offers an undergraduate degree inB.E(Bachelor of Engineering). The course is offered for a duration of four years, divided into eight semesters of six months each. Students can pursue the course across multiple specialisations, such asComputer Science & Engineering, Civil Engineering,Mechanical Engineering, and more. The basic eligibility requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Students must have studied PCM in Class 12. Selection is entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the AJEE exam. Find below key highlights forRabindranath Tagore University B.E admission:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission is entrance-based. Students wishing to enrol in to the university need to make sure that they satisfy both the basic eligibility and selection criteria to get a seat. The admission criteria of the B.E course is as follows:Class 12 with Maths from a recognised board or equivalent diplomaAJEE examination

faqs.question: What are the B.E courses offered by Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: At Rabindranath Tagore University, students are offered several B.E courses at the undergraduate level. These programmes are offered in full-time mode for a duration of four years. The admission criteria is same for all of the specialisations. Find below a list of B.E courses offered by the university:CSECSE in AI & MLCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringECEElectrical Electronics Engineering

faqs.question: How can I apply for BCom admission at Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University BCom application process is conducted online as well as offline. Candidates willing to apply offline can visit the university's campus to obtain the application form. Alternatively, candidates can apply online through the university's official website. The application form must be submitted with an application fee of INR 500. The steps included in the online application process are presented in the infogaphic below:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the Rabindranath Tagore University BCom course?
faqs.answer: Aspirants willing to take admission at Rabindranath Tagore University for a BCom must begin with the application process. The process can be completed online or offline. The university screens the received applications and qualifying candidates are called for the selection rounds, which may include a written entrance test, group discussion, interview, etc. The university may also provide direct admissions, subject to fulfilment of the preset criteria. The final step in the admission process it to report to the campus for document verification and submit the first instalment of the course fee.

placement_data.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rabindranath Tagore University concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Rabindranath Tagore University placements 2025 stood at INR 18 LPA . Further, over 600 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2025 batch. More than 6,000 students were placed during the 2025 placement drive. The top recruiters of Rabindranath Tagore University in 2025 included Toyota, Tech Mahindra, Paytm, Infosys, Wipro, Reliance Retail, IndusInd Bank, ICICI Bank, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty in this college is also good, who teach well and tell the students to stay understanding.
reviews.review_text: Nice hostel and good food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RNTU Bhopal academics, campus, and beyond.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are decent with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available. RNTU Bhopal provides good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good labs, and a rich library for students.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. There are several facilities for students like a gym, library, cricket or football ground, basketball court, badminton court, libraries, etc., and useful facilities are all included.

reviews.review_heading: Average university only for degrees, not for studies.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine except for network issues. University campus provides hostel guest house, canteen, auditorium, etc. The infrastructure is very good. The main problem is that it is not in Bhopal, it is in Raise. Take admission after knowing all the details.

reviews.review_heading: Diploma in Medical Lab Technician.
reviews.review_text: Rabindranath Tagore University supports an enormous number of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Laboratories are sanitized regularly, and the needed equipment is brought once a year. It's compulsory to wear lab coats throughout the day except during theoretical classes.

reviews.review_heading: This college offers excellence in technical education.
reviews.review_text: Avar University insists on a specific set of objectives to follow on campus for maintaining college decorum. Individual office rooms are arranged for placement offices, administrative offices, HODs, and PT incharges. Health care unit is also arranged for students' concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Consistent technical education.
reviews.review_text: Students get access to medical emergencies at any time. Classrooms are developed with needed tools. There are no sports hours in our schedule. Sometimes, canteens are very crowded. The hostel provides food at a specific time.

reviews.review_heading: A mini short college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, you can directly compare it with world-class infrastructure. The classrooms are very systematic and clean, and you will never be disappointed in terms of cleanliness and peacefulness. I think Wi-Fi will never work here, even if you have the password.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, environment, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: RNTU is the number 1 college in Bhopal city, so the infrastructure is very classic and attractive. We have good Wi-Fi connectivity. The campus has a good environment. There are high classrooms and a lab. Classrooms have good surroundings. Good facilities are provided. They have value for money. Overall, the hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good private colleges in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure in our college is nice.
There is a Wi-Fi facility available with high speed.
A decent library is there, as is a big computer lab with at least 200 systems.
Hostel is available for both Boys and Girls.
Gym facilities are also available in the hostel.
Mess food is above average.(Non-veg not allowed).
Fantastic canteen is there.
Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Rabindranath Tagore University is the best in itself for placements.
reviews.review_text: RNTU hostels offer excellent facilities in the rooms, including daily cleaning, food, and Wi-Fi. Overall, the amenities provided by Rabindranath Tagore University are great, and I am thankful for all the support from the teachers, mentors, and principal.

reviews.review_heading: Rabindranath Tagore university.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with neat classrooms, highly infrastructured buildings with all the facilities. All the students behave themselves to maintain the decorum of our college. There is a big spacious library, an open auditorium, and good transportation facilities available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rabindranath Tagore University.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members and the infrastructure are totally fine. The faculty is very friendly with the students; they are flexible with them. The way of teaching is absolutely fine, and the infrastructure is really good, with all the facilities available in our course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Com from the Rabindranath Tagore University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are available at Rabindranath Tagore University. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteens, classrooms, etc. facilities are available at this college. Hostel facilities at this college were also available for the students. The food available for students in the hostel was also good to eat.

paragraphs: The total Rabindranath Tagore University BA fee vary across the BA specialisations offered at the university. For a BA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the total fee is INR 60,000. It is payable in three annual instalments of INR 20,000. For all other BA specialisations at RNTU Bhopal, the total fee is INR 36,000. The annual instalment for the three-year course comes down to INR 12,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Rabindranath Tagore University provides a four-year BE course in the full-time mode. The BE fee at RNTU Bhopal is INR 1.8 lakh for various specialisations. It is payable in annual instalments. The fee structure may also include other components, such as admission/registration fees, hostel fees, security deposits, etc. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
91% and above

Rabindranath Tagore University offers scholarships of up to 40% through its Shiksha Mitra Scholarship Scheme. Students pursuing BCom, BBA, BCA, BA LLB, BA, BAJMC, B.E (except CSE), or BSC (except Nursing & Agriculture) at RNTU Bhopal can avail of these scholarships. faqs.answer: The Faculty of Engineering and Technology (FET) at Jain University, Bangalore offers courses in engineering and technology at undergraduate and advanced levels. admission_overview.college_name: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology Course Admissions 2026: Eligibility, Application Process, Fees, Dates

admission_overview.title: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology admissions are mainly entrance-based. The application process can be completed online. Also known as JU-FET, the Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology, offers a four-year BTech course and a two-year MTech course in various specialisations of Engineering and Technology. It offers these courses through its seven schools of study namely - School of Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical & Electronics, Computer Science & Engineering, Aerospace, Basic Sciences and Food Technology. Admission to the college's courses are done based on the entrance exams conducted by Jain University. Students need to appear for the Jain Entrance Test also known as JET. The exam is conducted by the university to shortlist students for various courses, including the BTech and MTech courses at the Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology. Alternatively, students can submit scores of other accepted exams, such as CUET/ UNIGAUGE, JEE, GATE, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology course admissions are offered based on preset admission criteria. The college offers BTech and BTech Lateral Entry courses at UG level. The duration of the BTech course is four years, divided into eight semesters. BTech Lateral Entry is offered for a duration of three years. At the PG level, the college offers MTech, a two-year (four-semester) course. Students need to either appear for the Jain Entrance Test (JET) or submit scores of other national/ state-level entrance test scores. Check the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for Jain University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% for SC/ST) with Physics and Mathematics as Compulsory Subjects + any of the following subjects -Chemistry/ Electronics/ Computer Science/ Biology
courses_table.selection_criteria: UNIGAUGE / JET/ CUET/ JEE Mains/ COMEDK

courses_table.eligibility: Diploma or BSc (PCM, PMCs, PME) or equivalent course with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% in case of SC, ST and Backward Classes of Karnataka candidates.)
BE/ BTech in the particular field of study as that of MTech specialisation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% in the qualifying examination in case of SC, ST).
courses_table.selection_criteria: GATE/ JET or any valid entrance score

faqs.answer: Students need to meet the admission requirements to get admission in the JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology. The JU-FET eligibility is as follows:JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology BTech eligibility - Class 12  with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% for SC/ST) with Physics and Mathematics + Chemistry/ Electronics/ Computer Science/ Biology JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology M.Tech eligibility - BE/ BTech in relevant stream with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% in the qualifying examination in case of SC, ST)
faqs.question: Who is eligible for JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology admissions?

faqs.answer: JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology selection criteria is entrance-based. The college accepts students only on entrance basis. The selection criteria for JU-FET courses is as below:BTech = JET/ JEE/ CUET/ UNIGAUGE/ COMEDK MTech = GATE/ JET
faqs.question: What is selection criteria at JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology?

faqs.answer: The admission to the B.Tech at the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain Deemed-to-be University, is based on COMEDK UGET exam scores. The specific cutoff lists for each exam will likely be released after the respective exam results are announced. So probably the cut-off will be released after the exam results are out. You can expect in between June - July month.
faqs.question: When will Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore cutoff list release?

faqs.answer: The JET exam for B.Tech is of 150 marks having 5 subjects- Physics (30), Chemistry (30), Mathematics (30), LR (30), English (30). Time is 3 hours in online mode.The cut off for JET  B.Tech is released rank wise and the result can be accessed by the official sites. The cut off varies from course to course because of the seats available and the applicants for the course received.
faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore JET cutoff 2023 for B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering?

admission_process.title: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology admissionsstarts with checking the eligibility of the desired course. Eligible students can start with the online application process followed by selection rounds, and fee payment. Students can follow the steps given below to complete theJU-FET admission process:
Jain University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology Application Process 2026

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
Selection Process 2026

Students are selected at the Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology based on entrance tests and academic performance. Students can either sit for JET or submit other valid scores. The course-wise selection process for the JU-FET programmes is as below:
The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility. Students need to meet both the basic eligibility and selection requirements to get admission.
Admission Confirmation

Once selected, candidates will get the provisional admission letter. Selected students need to pay theJain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology feesto confirm their seat in the college.
Check out more on Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology in the below video:
lists: BTech Selection Process= Class 12 with relevant subjects & a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% for SC/ST) + JET/ JEE/ CUET/ UNIGAUGE/ COMEDK
MTech Selection Process= Bachelor's degree in relevant stream + GATE/ JET scores

courses_data.description: Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology BTech admissionsare entrance-based. The institute also offers a three-year BTech (Lateral Entry) admission in the second year/ third semester in 19 specialisations (same as that of BTech course). Admission to BTech (Lateral Entry) is merit-based. Details related to the Jain University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology BTech admission are as follows: Class 12 from a recognised board of higher education with a minimum aggregate of 45%(40% for SC/ST) with Physics and Mathematics as Compulsory Subjects with Chemistry/ Electronics/ Computer Science/ Biology. Accepted Exams- JET/ JEE/ CUET/ UNIGAUGE/ COMEDK

faqs.question: How can I get admission in JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology BTech?
faqs.answer: To get admission in JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology BTech, students need to first check the eligibility. Eligible students can complete the steps below to get admission in the college:Apply online at the official site by paying application fee and submitting documents.Appear for the JET exam if scores of other accepted exams are not available.Go through the selection rounds and get shrotlisted to get the provisional admission letter.Final admission is done aft

courses_data.name: Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology MTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Admission to the Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and TechnologyMTechadmission is entrance exam based. Candidates are required to appear forGATEorJET. There are a total of 13 MTech specialisations and each MTech specialisation has separate eligibility criteria. But the basic eligibly criteria along with other admission details is mentioned below: Course and Duration Basic Eligibility Criteria MTech: 2 years BE / BTech with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for SC/ ST students ) in the related or same specialisation as that of MTech of all the years/semesters is eligible to apply.

faqs.question: What entrance exam need to be cleared for MTech admission at Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Students seeking admissions at the Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology for M.Tech are required to have a valid score in GATE/JET. Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore offers various specialisations under their M.Tech programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the M.Tech programme at Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Entry into M.Tech course of Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology is given through entrance examinations such as GATE or JET. Individuals need to hold a BE/BTech degree with an aggregate percentage of at least 50% (45% for SC/ST) with the same/similar specialisation of the M.Tech course. Jain University provides 13 M.Tech specializations for which individual particular eligibility is laid down. Eligible candidates need to apply online and pass the mandatory entrance exam

faqs.question: Can I take admission to Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology with 75% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, those candidates who have obtained 75% in Class 12 are eligible for admission to BTech in Jain Deemed University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology. But eligibility is just an assurance that one can get admission, because candidates also need to perform well in entrance exams such as JET or Uni-GAUGE. The final merit is on the basis of merit, keeping in view the entrance test marks and overall academic record. Thus, getting a good rank in the mandatory entrance exam is a must to provide an added boost towards securing admission.

faqs.question: Is JEE compulsory for JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology admission?
faqs.answer: No, for JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Faculty of Engineering & Technology admissions, JEE is not compulsory. Students can submit scores of other accepted exams as well. These include CUET/ UNIGAUGE/ COMEDK, etc. Or, students can appear for the Jain Entrance Test (JET).

faqs.question: How many students can do M.Tech at School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: At School of Engineering and Technology, M.Tech is available for only in ECE, ML, Civil department. In each department, equal number of seats are available. 30 seats are there in each in each department, so, total numbar of seats are 90.Eligibility criteria -Students must have 55% in Graduation Degree. With a qualifying GATE score and graduation percentage you can qualify for M.Tech at School of Engineering and Technology.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for B.Tech at Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Depending on the particular school and course, the selection procedure for the B.Tech programme at the Jain Deemed-to-be University, Faculty of Engineering and Technology may change. Generally speaking, students' performance on engineering entrance exams determines their admittance to the B.Tech degree. According to the Class 12 syllabus, the foundation of engineering is the focus of these entrance tests.For example, admissions to BITS Pilani are determined by the results of the BITSAT entrance exams. For admission to the M.Tech programme at the SCMS School of Engineering & Technology, individuals with valid GATE scores are given precedence. Similarly, applicants must complete the KEAM application and receive a qualifying score at the Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology.

placement_data.title: Jain Deemed to be University Faculty of Engineering and Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain University has released the placement details for batch passed out in 2025. The overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 was INR 81.25 LPA. The average package offered stood at INR 8 LPA . More than 3,000 companies visited the campus to hire BTech and MTech students. The students secured more than 2500 job offers from the participating recruiters. Some of the top recruiters of Faculty of Engineering and Technology Jain University in 2025 include Saint-Gobain, Samsung, Siemens, Schneider Electric, TCS,Silicon Labs, etc.

Over 500 prospective recruiters have hired more than 6,200 students from Jain University campuses over the last few years. Apart from onboarding companies for Campus Placements, Team SCAPS also strives to narrow the gap between institute and industry through various initiatives. A series of Guest Lectures are arranged regularly to keep students abreast of the latest happenings in the industry. Workshops and Conferences are organized for all branches of students to have hands-on experience and also a platform to showcase their latest research work. Industrial visits are arranged especially for non-IT branch students to have first-hand experience of the industry environment and to understand the working environment.

faqs.question: How is Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore for M.Tech in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: The Faculty of Engineering and Technology (FET) at Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore has overall good placement records for M.Tech, but it is comparatively lesser than B.Tech in the college. The available data suggests that the placement rate for M.Tech is lower compared to B.Tech at the college, as in 2023 placement rate of M.Tech was 10.64%, compared to 54.27% for B.Tech. The average package for M.Tech at the college is INR 5.95 LPA and for B.Tech was INR 6.95 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for M.Tech in Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Jain Deemed-to-be University, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: The tuition fees for the M.Tech programme in Food Technology at FET are INR 3.50-4.20 Lakhs for the entire programme duration, depending upon the specializations you choose. The bifurcation is given below: Tuition Fee: INR 3.50-4.20 Lakhs (according to specialization) Hostel Fee: INR 3.40 Lakh One-Time Payment: INR 20,000 The above fees exclude exam fees, practical fees etc. Expenses on book and transportation are also excluded.

hostel.description:
The residential arrangements are separate for boys and girls. University accommodations are managed by the Hostel Management Division. The facilities we provide are guided strictly by the sense of comfort and quality life for our students.

In a room 2 inmates with attached bathroom & hostel provides a cot, a mattress, one set of bed sheet and a pillow cover, a study table, a chair and a cupboard for each student. Every hostel has solar heated water facility, common water cooler, common TV room, etc.

Room furniture and electric fittings are required to be maintained by the inmates in good condition. At the time of allotment of room and leaving the hostel for the summer vacation, every student must take-over and hand-over, respectively, the hostel property carefully. Students should invariably vacate the hostel during summer vacation.

In case of damage to any part of the hostel buildings, furniture, apparatus or other property of the University, caused by inmates of the hostel, the loss shall be recovered from the persons identified as responsible for such damage. However, if the persons causing damage cannot be identified, the cost of repairing the same as may be assessed will be distributed equally amongst all the inmates of the hostel or group of inmates of the hostel found responsible for the damage.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: I'm from the B.Tech Computer Science artificial intelligence and machines learning course. We have specialised AI labs which we use to do programs. Classrooms are air-conditioned with adequate space and efficiency. The food quality is good, and it is pure vegetarian. There are medical facilities within the campus. We have all sorts of sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because they give us a chance to do something new and show our talent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities I get here include almost everything, like Wi-Fi, library, labs, hall rooms for practice, and digital classrooms. There is a huge canteen with every facility, like AC and filtered water. Every day, there is a change in food variety. There are playing areas for every sport and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Not good on the faculty members' side.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course and department, for example, Wi-Fi is not good, and the lab is okay. Classroom is not bad, and their library is so bad. There is no quality in the facilities of our hostel, and they are repeating the same menu for the food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a pretty decent college, but very far from the city.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a little slow on the campus, but overall, everything is good with cleanliness and study space. The library is decent too, with a good amount of books, space, and cleanliness. There is a good environment with nature. Only some classrooms have ACs, depending on the course we take, and I don't know why it is like that.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities but it is located too far outside Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good but is located far away from the city, 40 KM away from Bengaluru. The university has a good infrastructure with all the facilities. But you won't find Wi-Fi everywhere. AC classrooms are provided to star batches who pay extra fees. Otherwise, you will get a non-AC classroom which is also decent. Labs and library are maintained very well. There is a lot of sports ground also consisting of cricket ground, football ground, tennis court, basketball, volleyball, and a swimming pool...

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure and good placements. Faculty members are improving.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the library is very big with many books. It has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the best infrastructure. In the hostel, there are all types of facilities like Wi-Fi, laundry, and 24-hour electricity. Rooms are cleaned every day and the mess food is very good. It has all types of sports and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very good ambiance with a strong positive energy.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very vast and very useful if used properly by a student, especially for a student studying in the CTMA branch. They have iMac labs for iOS development. The rest of the facilities like Wi-Fi are available at full speed all the time with no issues. Every lab is equipped with all the necessary lab equipment. Classrooms are well-maintained with proper seating arrangements. The library is also very well-organised with a vast variety of option...

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is nice. It is well-equipped with Wi-Fi. We have good lecture halls and a resourceful library. Hostel is well maintained and has 1, 2, and 3 sharing rooms with attached bathrooms. Hostel food is pure vegetarian but it is really good. It is well-prepared and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on the Jain University.
reviews.review_text: We have a separate classroom for our batch and we do have a computer lab. There is a physics lab and a chemistry lab. We do have a workshop for first-year students. The hostel facilities are quite good but the food taste is not good. Although medical facilities and sports are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jain University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is great, to be honest. They are very friendly, and when it comes to teaching quality, I can say that they are top-notch. Most of them have done PhDs in their specific subjects and have a lot of knowledge in their field. The infrastructure is great too. We have availability of Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, projectors, and advanced tables to charge our laptops and phones.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoyable but don't leave studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and we love enjoying the views from our campus. The faculty is very nice, and every lecturer takes care of everyone in the classroom, providing great support to the students. The hostel facilities, food, mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports are all very supportive of the students. However, one thing I don’t like is that only vegetarian options are available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure, average faculty, good sports, a fun life, and average placements
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome. Wi-Fi is average on campus, but in the hostel, it is good. Our classrooms are alright. There are labs according to subjects. The food is good compared to other colleges. There are 3 -5 canteens. For sports freshmen, it's tough to get into a team, but there are sports like football, tennis, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This is my experience so far.
reviews.review_text: The food in the mess is quite repetitive.  It's good in the beginning, but eventually, it gets boring. Wi-Fi doesn't work most of the time. There is no medical facility on campus, so if we get sick, we need to go to the nearest hospital.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at Jain University .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so good, with a good garden and plants around the campus, which gives a pleasant feeling. They are so good they provide two hostels for both boys and girls. The hostels are two sharing with attached bathrooms and all. And they provide Wi-Fi and 24-hour hot water in hostels. The food in the hostel is good, but they do not provide non-vegetarian food, and they also don't allow non-vegetarians into the campus. Jain is the best place for sports and games activities beca...

reviews.review_heading: It's been 2 months and so far college life is going smoothly.
reviews.review_text: The college has hostels inside the campus and outside the campus as well. There is a food court, but only people from the hostel can eat there. Day scholars can't even buy that food, but there's a separate section to buy. Classrooms, labs, and the library are spacious, but the Wi-Fi doesn't work properly and you don't even get mobile network signals.

college_info.intro:
Renaissance University popular programmes are BSc and BTech. The university provides a cutting-edge curriculum with a blend of both practicals and theory. The university provides hands-on learning to students through lab work, projects, and industry training. Renaissance University provides internship opportunities to students with leading Cloud Computing companies. Renaissance University Indore provides research opportunities to students through various workshops, seminars, and projects.
Renaissance University BTech students are placed in top companies such as HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, ICICI Bank, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Renaissance University and their respective eligibility and the Renaissance University fee structure:

Many students started their own start-ups

faqs.answer: A:    Renaissance University's MBA placements show promise; the average package is 9,00,000, while the highest package is 13,00,000.The university's placement cell seeks to support each student's transition into the real world by offering appropriate career and training opportunities.It makes it easier for students and possible employers to connect, which promotes on-campus hiring.The placement policy highlights successful placements with prestigious corporate recruiters and describes the duties
faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    Renaissance University offers good placements annually for courses like MBA, MCA and BCA, etc. in 2024, over 300 recruiters participated and presented various placements to the batch 2024. The key highlights of Renaissance University placements for the Class of 2024 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)Highest package (international)INR 13.30 LPAHighest package (national)INR 5.75 LPATotal recruiters300+NOTE: The placement data year was not mentioned in the official pla
faqs.question: How are the placements at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    MBA graduates from Renaissance University earn more on average.According to sources, the average package was around INR 5 LPA (Lakh Per Year) in 2022. The rate may increase to INR 9 LPA by 2023. The highest reported bundle may be significantly be INR13 LPA in 2023.
faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes,  Renaissance University Indore offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MTech, BBA, LLB, etc. As per the latest report, the highest national and international packages offered during Renaissance University placements in 2024 stood at INR 5.75 LPA and INR 13.30 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2024 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc.
faqs.question: Is Renaissance University Indore good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Renaissance University in Indore provides a three-year BSc programme to students. To be eligible, applicants must have class 12 scores with 45% aggregate from a recognised board. Please refer to the table below for information on Renaissance University's BSc eligibility, fees:ParametersDetailsCourseBScEligibilityEligibility: Class 12 with 45%Selection: Merit-basedTotal Tuition FeesINR 75,000 - INR 4.5 lakhNOTE: The mentioned data is from external sources. Hence, it may vary.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Renaissance University BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to its undergraduate and graduate programs in Renaissance University, including the MBA program, the University accepts scores from the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam. This is the only option to enter this college, they do not provide any other alternative option for admissions. You have to give Pearson Undergraduate Entrance examination.It is compulsory for each applicants wherever from his or she is.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Renaissance University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Renaissance University does not accept CLAT results for enrollment in any of its courses. National Law Universities (NLUs) and other collaborating institutions offer undergraduate and graduate law programmes, to which CLAT is specifically tailored for admission.The main academic areas of study at Renaissance University include business, management, engineering, science, and humanities.For the majority of its programmes, the institution administers its own entrance tests, which are the Renaissance Management Aptitude Test (RMAT) for postgraduate studies and the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test for undergraduate programmes. You will not be allowed to use your CLAT score if you would like to pursue law at Renaissance University. The university's undergraduate law programme, requires you to take the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test.
faqs.question: Does Renaissance University accept CLAT score?

faqs.answer: A:    The common eligibility for Renaissance University is class 12 with 50% for UG courses and Graduation with 50% for PG courses and selection will be merit-based. Companies such as Kotak, Parle, Bajaj, and OYO visit the college for placements. Roles offered by the companies include Forensic Scientist, Cyber Forensic, and Lab Assistant. Around 50% of students get internships in small forensic companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

review_content.Infrastructure: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. review_summary.college_name: Renaissance University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college for BCA students.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students were placed in college. This helps students to get placed in big companies. More than 60% of students were placed in job roles with an average package of 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA, while the highest package is 23 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. Every department of our college is well placed - well organised. Every department is well built and provides every facility, such as Wi-Fi, computers, and so on. The quality of food provided in our college helps students to eat good food.

individual_reviews.course: MBA Core Dual degree - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is absolutely value for money, especially for the college life.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is nice. Approximately 85–90% of students get placements in every session, which is excellent compared to other universities. The packages offered by companies are between 8 and 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ICICI, HDFC, Asian Paints, etc. Most of the roles offered are in Sales.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that needs to be in the college is here in terms of infrastructure and facilities. It includes well-furnished classrooms, a huge library full of books, a canteen, a beautiful garden, and a huge play area. The quality of food in the canteen and in the hostel is also very good. They are maintained with hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: There is no attendance issue, few surprises, and the college life is of good quality.

content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Companies such as Kotak, Parle, Bajaj, and OYO visit the college for placements. Roles offered by the companies include Forensic Scientist, Cyber Forensic, and Lab Assistant. Around 50% of students get internships in small forensic companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college with good teachers and many events to enjoy.

content.Placements: Placement is not so great, but it is good as per the course. Teachers help you prepare for this, and many different companies with a good reputation come here. There are many sessions by motivational speakers from all around the world that guide you to choose your path.
content.Infrastructure: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. There is also a good canteen area where you can enjoy with your friends. Every department has its classes in different buildings.

individual_reviews.course: MBA Core Dual degree - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: They have a very good library with lots of books & novels.

content.Placements: As per the latest report, more than 300 recruiters participated in Renaissance University annually. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2023 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors with new-age job profiles.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides hostels, which are quite affordable, that is, 6500/month for both girls and boys. The room has two partners, two separate cupboards and attached washrooms. The menu and food quality are average, which should be improved. There is a registration process that depends on the availability and vacancy of hostel rooms.

admission_overview.college_name: Renaissance University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Renaissance University Indore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Renaissance University offers 25+ undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees, Diplomas, and certificate courses under its 12 schools. The mode of application for all the courses is online/ offline. The university offers courses in various disciplines of Management, Science, Arts, Law, Design, Agriculture, Communication and Journalism, Commerce, and Library Science. The selection of candidates will be based on the merit score of the candidates. For more highlights refer to the table below:
Particulars
Renaissance University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of Study
Regular/Full time
Programmes Offered
25+ courses across multiple specialisations
Admission Status 2025
How to Apply
https://renaissance.ac.in/register-now/
Levels of programmes offered
UG, PG, Diploma and Certificate
Popular Programmes
BSc, MBA/PGDM, BBA, BCom, LLB

The basic eligibility for admission at Renaissance University is merit in the last qualifying examination. UG admissions are granted on basis the of Class 12 merit, whereas a bachelor's degree is considered for PG admissions. PhD candidates must have a master's degree in a relevant discipline. Admission to most of the courses at the university is merit-based. The table below lists the various courses offered at Renaissance University along with their eligibility and Selection:
Course Name
Eligibility
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (Physics and Chemistry, along with Biology/ Mathematics/ Agriculture)
Merit-based
Graduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Graduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
LLB/ BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
For more detailed information on fees and coursesclick here
The step-wise admission process at RU is given below
Step 1: Renaissance University Admission Process 2025

The first step in the admission process is to fill out the application/ registration form. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the interested course and after the completion of the form, the last step is to pay the application fee and proceed for submission.
Step 2:Renaissance University Selection Process
The counsellor will call registered students to proceed with admission and documentation verification before considering their enrollment.
Step 3: Renaissance University Enrollment

Candidates who have fulfilled the desired criteria will be considered for admission. The selected students are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats with respective time/ deadlines. They will be provided with the enrollment number as a confirmation of Admission.

faqs.question: Can I join Renaissance University directly?
faqs.answer: YES, you can join directly.The university offers direct admission to the MBA programme as well as other UG and PG programs based on merit.Renaissance University's MBA programme typically has requirements for completing specific educational levels and earning a certain amount of marks.The candidate's academic record and the availability of seats determine the selection process.You would have to pay a registration fee and complete an online application in order to apply.Renaissance University's MBA programme offers a range of specializations for final-year students and strives to develop "managerial artists" with strong decision-making abilities, social sensitivity, strategic vision, and flexibility in interpersonal relationships.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility at Renaissance University?
faqs.answer: The common eligibility for Renaissance University is class 12 with 50% for UG courses and Graduation with 50% for PG courses and selection will be merit-based. The eligibility and selection with respective of course is mentioned below:Course NameEligibilitySelectionBScClass 12 with 50% aggregate (Physics and Chemistry, along with Biology/ Mathematics/ Agriculture)Merit-basedMBAGraduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedBBA (Hons)Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedBComClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedLLBGraduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedLLMLLB/ BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-based

faqs.question: Does Renaissance University accept CLAT score?
faqs.answer: No, Renaissance University does not accept CLAT results for enrollment in any of its courses. National Law Universities (NLUs) and other collaborating institutions offer undergraduate and graduate law programmes, to which CLAT is specifically tailored for admission.The main academic areas of study at Renaissance University include business, management, engineering, science, and humanities.For the majority of its programmes, the institution administers its own entrance tests, which are the Renaissance Management Aptitude Test (RMAT) for postgraduate studies and the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test for undergraduate programmes. You will not be allowed to use your CLAT score if you would like to pursue law at Renaissance University. The university's undergraduate law programme, requires you to take the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for B.Com admissions at Renaissance University, Indore?
faqs.answer: Renaissance University Indore makes the selection of students for the BCom courses based on merit in the qualifying examination. In order to get admission, interested candidates must check the eligibility criteria. Those who are eligible can apply for the preferred BCom course via the official website of the university. After the application process, the university prepares a rank list based on the merit in the qualifying examination. The admission committee then shortlists students based on the rank list.

placement_report.college_name: Renaissance University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Renaissance University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Renaissance University has a Training and Placement Department, which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The department invites companies from different sectors to conduct the interview process at the Campus premises. The final placements at Renaissance University are a result of a very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

As per the latest report, the highest global package offered during Renaissance University placements 2024 stood at INR 13.20 LPA, whereas the highest national package offered stood at INR 5.75 LPA. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2024 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank , etc.
