reviews.review_heading: Good college for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good. Every department of our college is well placed - well organised. Every department is well built and provides every facility, such as Wi-Fi, computers, and so on. The quality of food provided in our college helps students to eat good food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely value for money, especially for the college life.
reviews.review_text: Everything that needs to be in the college is here in terms of infrastructure and facilities. It includes well-furnished classrooms, a huge library full of books, a canteen, a beautiful garden, and a huge play area. The quality of food in the canteen and in the hostel is also very good. They are maintained with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: There is no attendance issue, few surprises, and the college life is of good quality.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with good teachers and many events to enjoy.
reviews.review_text: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. There is also a good canteen area where you can enjoy with your friends. Every department has its classes in different buildings.

reviews.review_heading: They have a very good library with lots of books & novels.
reviews.review_text: The university provides hostels, which are quite affordable, that is, 6500/month for both girls and boys. The room has two partners, two separate cupboards and attached washrooms. The menu and food quality are average, which should be improved. There is a registration process that depends on the availability and vacancy of hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2023-24.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were very good, and their programs were very interesting. The building was very good. Very good infrastructure and a well-maintained college. The buildings were also very good and well-maintained, and the natural infrastructure was very good. The ground was very clean and attractive. Swapnil Sir conducted the programs, and film stars came to our college to motivate us. The canteen was very clean, and Vijay Bhaiya makes very tasty food in college.

reviews.review_heading: Research carefully before taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but there was no focus on the academic syllabus. Wi-Fi facility was available, but not for students. The hostel was below average they actually tied up with local hostels and did not have their own hostels for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Renaissance University is average. Also, they do not have a return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at Renaissance University are a gym, library, swimming pool, cafeteria, canteen, computer lab, science lab, pathology lab, fashion designing lab, placement center, ground, garden, cricket ground, football ground, basketball ground, agriculture lab, pharmacy lab, agriculture area for practices, conference hall, etc. At Renaissance University, there is no hostel for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Things about Renaissance University to know.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library, computer labs, an auditorium, good classrooms, and a canteen. All facilities are accessible to all students. The hostel is average and very close to the college. They have sports and cultural events. There is an annual fest in the college every year.

reviews.review_heading: This is an absolute no!
reviews.review_text: Renaissance University has good infrastructure but the hostels are below average. The library is good but Wi-Fi is not often available. There is a basketball court and a swimming pool that students can use in their free time. The food in the canteen is below average but it is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is highly supportive, and the curriculum is well-structured to meet industry needs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms, labs, and a library that supports learning. The campus is clean and well-maintained, providing a comfortable environment for studies. The hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms, regular maintenance, and a decent mess. Overall, the infrastructure ensures a smooth academic and living experience.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, facilities, and an affordable fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is all good. Facilities are also good. The hostel infrastructure is good, new buildings are constructed, and the different department has different buildings on campus. There are 2 gyms and 2 libraries and 2 -3 canteens in college. The college has a good campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with skilled, helpful teachers and an attractive campus.
reviews.review_text: Building of this college is very beautiful. Classrooms are completely hygienic, and smart campus has canteen and first aid facilities. Library has a very peaceful atmosphere and is open from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Gym is also available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Renaissance University Indore Reality.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average, and the infrastructure is old. They are trying to build new infrastructure for the upcoming students. They show AC classrooms during admissions, but they do not have AC classrooms at all. They have a huge library, a training hall, a theatre, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Renaissance University(forensic science).
reviews.review_text: Labs are arranged weekly for our department, and it is a good way of knowing how to handle things in the real world. Classrooms are not bad; they are average. The library, I would say, is pretty good. It is really nice to work on the library, especially during the winters, but during the summers it opens up a lot.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science (AI and ML) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A great college (go for it).

review_content.Placements: I am currently in my 1st year of B.Tech. In AI and ML, and though I have not personally experienced placements yet, I have heard a lot from my seniors. The placement scenario is pretty good here. Most of the top companies visit the campus. The average package is around 8 LPA - 10 LPA, which is not bad at all when compared to other universities. The university has strong industry tie-ups, and reputed recruiters from all over the country come for campus drives. If you are worried about placements, you need not worry so much.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is pretty impressive as well. You are literally in the middle of the mountains, but all the facilities you would expect from a top college are available here, spacious classrooms with projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. The hostels are great too, with AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and even free laundry service. The rooms are cleaned on alternate days, maintaining hygiene. The food served in the mess is clean and healthy, though sometimes a little boring and repetitive, but it is good. There is also a cafe, a stocked shop for daily essentials, and an ATM.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Universal Business School is the best Green B school in India.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent student are placed. The highest salary package is 1.01 crores and the lowest salary packege 8 lac p.a. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Deloitte, Google, Sony, PepsiCo, Oyo, Uber etc. The Domestic salary package is 24 lac p.a.
review_content.Infrastructure: College offers single, double A/C rooms With ensuite washroom, common living and dining room with kitchenette, Wi-Fi, laundry, Gym and extensive sport facilities. The classrooms are full of modern resources. And the infrastructure is very good. The library has a collection of 40000 books and a modern computer lab.

review_summary.college_name: Universal AI University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA Single Specialization - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Universal AI University- A step towards an AI career.

content.Placements: Universal AI University has seen recruiters such as L&T Finance, Aditya Birla Capital, HDFC, SBI Mutual Fund, and Deloitte. The average package is around 8.5 LPA which is respectable but not elite. These equip students with strong internships, analytics skills, and project depth. If you're passive don't expect these names to magically turn into offers.
content.Infrastructure: Universal AI University provides both girls and boys accommodation with top-class quality with dual and triple sharing and fully AC rooms with cleanliness and clear cleaning thrice a week. The infrastructure is very beautiful, surrounded by nature, green mountains, and waterfalls in the monsoon season and a pollution-free environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (AI and ML) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Promising college with good faculty and growing opportunities.

content.Placements: College has a pretty good placement record, especially the MBA department. Since I am from B.Tech which is relatively new program here (only 3 years old), my department does not have a placement record yet. But as our college has a collaboration with L&T and Mindtree for its syllabus and other important aspects for B.Tech. Placement is promising, and I have also seen many companies for on-campus placement such as L'Oréal, Nestle, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is good. Classrooms are clean and are equipped with projectors, Wi-Fi, and a board. The hostel is good with options like double sharing, triple sharing, and dome style all included with AC and Wi-Fi. There are sports areas, a stocked shop, and a cafe for basic needs and service. There is also a medical center.

admission_overview.college_name: Universal AI University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: Universal AI University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Universal AI University admission 2025 is open. The college offers one UG and one PG course, such as BTech and MBA. Universal AI University offers an online mode of application. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria set by the college. For final selection, the basic eligibility is to pass the last qualifying exam or have score of national level entrance exams such as JEE Main, MAH CET etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Universal AI University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Universal AI University offers admission to all courses based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility and selection criteria for the desired courses. The basic eligibility criteria for UG are to pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board, and graduation for PG courses. Candidates must apply online on the college's official website for admission. Check below Universal AI University course eligibility and selection criteria for all courses: Course

faqs.answer: Hi.Universal AI University admissions are offered based on entrance exam scores. The college considers Class 12 with at least 65% marks for admission in UG courses. Whereas, undergraduate degree scores are considered for admission in postgraduate courses.Universal AI University accepts CAT/CMAT/GMAT/NMAT/CET entrance exam scores to provide admission to PGDM and MBA programme.Universal Ai University, Karjat UG admission into B.Des, BBA, BA (Hons) is done based on the UBSAT test followed by an interview processThanks .

courses_data.name: Universal AI University B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:PERA CET, MHT CET, JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, Maharashtra HSC
courses_data.description: Universal AI University has BTech in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning and BTech in Data Science, two of the most sought-after courses presently. Both the courses offer hands-on training with hi-tech tools, AI labs, data analysis, and live projects. The students enjoy multidisciplinary learning, internships, and international exposure with LTIMindtree as an academic associate. Both the degrees lead to high-paying careers in technology, healthcare, finance, and other sectors.

faqs.question: What makes Universal AI University’s BTech in AI & ML unique?
faqs.answer: Universal AI University's BTech in AI & ML is special because it provides India's first multidisciplinary 5-discipline curriculum. The course covers AI lab projects, research papers, capstone projects, and SDG-based learning. There are 65% experiential learning and leadership opportunities for students. In association with LTIMindtree, the course provides global-standard internships and placement opportunities.

faqs.question: How does Universal AI University’s BTech in Data Science prepare students for the future?
faqs.answer: Universal AI University's BTech in Data Science educates students in programming tools such as Python, R, and SQL for practical use. The syllabus emphasizes predictive modeling, classification, and data visualization for industries such as finance, healthcare, and marketing. Students go through internships, research work, and AI lab training for industry preparedness. The collaboration with LTIMindtree guarantees robust integration with the industry and career development.

faqs.question: What career opportunities are available after completing B.Tech in AI & ML or Data Science from Universal AI University?
faqs.answer: BTech in AI & ML or Data Science graduates from Universal AI University are eligible for positions like Data Scientist, AI Engineer, Machine Learning Specialist, and Business Analyst. Through hands-on project work and 2 internships, students are placed in the global tech-enabled industries. Problem-solving, innovation, and leadership development skills make the graduates highly placed in the employability list for technology, healthcare, finance, and research sectors.

courses_data.description: Universal AI University provides a 2-year Executive MBA in Mumbai for working professionals. It offers flexible learning, online and offline classes. With international exposure, UGC approval, and nominal fees, the EMBA offers career development and leadership opportunities for students.

faqs.question: What is the duration and fee of the Executive MBA at Universal AI University?
faqs.answer: The Executive MBA from Universal AI University is a part-time 2-year program. The overall programme cost is INR 1,98,000, with education loan facilities provided. The programme is specifically designed for working professionals in Mumbai. It provides flexibility as well as AI-integrated learning.

faqs.question: What specializations are offered in the Executive MBA at Universal AI University?
faqs.answer: Executive MBA at Universal AI University has specializations in HR, Marketing, Finance, and Operations. In addition to these, the programme also incorporates AI skills such as automation, machine learning, and data analytics. These assist the students in making strategic decisions and running businesses successfully. It puts emphasis on combining management with state-of-the-art AI expertise.

faqs.question: How does Universal AI University’s Executive MBA benefit working professionals?
faqs.answer: Universal AI University's Executive MBA equips professionals with leadership and AI-based decision-making capabilities. It provides hybrid learning for adaptability and emphasizes global business practices. The programme has industry expert and global CEO endorsement for real-world relevance. The graduates enjoy global exposure and leadership opportunities in upper-level management jobs.

placement_report.college_name: Universal AI University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package and Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Universal AI University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Universal AI University placement report 2025 has been out on the official website. The highest domestic package offered stood at INR 24 LPA . The highest international package offered was INR 31.54 LPA . Moreover, the highest international package offered all time was INR 100 LPA . Further, the average and overall average packages offered were INR 11.37 LPA and INR 7.85 LPA , respectively. The top 50% average package offered was INR 13.42 LPA . The season 2025 recorded a total of 334 offers and 15 international placements . The highest stipend offered during internship was INR 43.83 Thousand per month . Additionally, 172 recruiters participated in total and 49 of them were new recruiters . Major recruiters that took part during the Universal AI University placements 2025 were KPMG, Amazon and Capgemini , etc.

reviews.review_heading: Universal AI University- A step towards an AI career.
reviews.review_text: Universal AI University provides both girls and boys accommodation with top-class quality with dual and triple sharing and fully AC rooms with cleanliness and clear cleaning thrice a week. The infrastructure is very beautiful, surrounded by nature, green mountains, and waterfalls in the monsoon season and a pollution-free environment.

reviews.review_heading: Promising college with good faculty and growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is good. Classrooms are clean and are equipped with projectors, Wi-Fi, and a board. The hostel is good with options like double sharing, triple sharing, and dome style all included with AC and Wi-Fi. There are sports areas, a stocked shop, and a cafe for basic needs and service. There is also a medical center.

reviews.review_heading: A great college (go for it).
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is pretty impressive as well. You are literally in the middle of the mountains, but all the facilities you would expect from a top college are available here, spacious classrooms with projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. The hostels are great too, with AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and even free laundry service. The rooms are cleaned on alternate days, maintaining hygiene. The food served in the mess is clean and healthy, though sometimes a little boring a...

reviews.review_heading: Universal Business School is the best Green B school in India.
reviews.review_text: College offers single, double A/C rooms With ensuite washroom, common living and dining room with kitchenette, Wi-Fi, laundry, Gym and extensive sport facilities. The classrooms are full of modern resources. And the infrastructure is very good. The library has a collection of 40000 books and a modern computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth joining.
reviews.review_text: Universal Business School provides the best infrastructure and hostel facility. Our college is located in a lush green valley, and it is surrounded by beautiful mountains. Our college provides well-maintained hostel facilities with good food and clean mess both for vegetarian and non-vegetarian sections.

reviews.review_heading: UBS - A crucial stepping stone for students who want to make themselves corporate ready.
reviews.review_text: UBS provides a holistic learning environment with laying major emphasis on experiential learning. The canteen is managed by Sodexo (a French Facility management firm), for which hygiene is of utmost importance. UBS' motto is work hard, party harder.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B-School with the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a best-in-class infrastructure, and it is the most attractive B-School in Maharashtra. There is a huge library with lots of informative books. There is an online trading room where you can invest your money and experience the real-time performance of your shares. Our college has a gym, playground and also an indoor games room.

reviews.review_heading: In the lap of nature surrounded by mountains.
reviews.review_text: Five star hostels with all the facilities like, AC, and other amenities. Sodexo canteen available which provides healthy foods with large variety. Medical facilities available. One doctor is available from 11:00 am to 5:00 pm and one care will be available 24*7 for emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus, in the lap of nature.
reviews.review_text:
Excellent hostel facilities with attach toilet and bathroom
Wi-Fi enabled campus, all the classrooms have projectors, Thomson & Reuter trading room
Sodexo canteen is available which provides healthy food with different vareity of foods. Library opens till 12 am in the night.

reviews.review_heading: In the lap of nature surrounded by mountains.
reviews.review_text:
Excellent hostel with all amenities, Sodexo canteen provides healthy food with so many variety. One car is available for 24*7 for emergency, one doctor is available from 11:00 am to 5:00 pm 
Indoor as well as outdoor sports are available EX. Basketball, Volleyball, Cricket ground, Pool, Snooker, Gym facility.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: There rooms like library, sports room, trading room, canteen and so on. The infrastructure is one of the best as it is fully green and surrounded by numerous waterfall. There is a medical facility is will 24 hours available for students. There are given sports sessions held for the students for refreshment.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B-school.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the first green B-school in India. The infrastructure is just amazing, with 21 waterfalls surrounding it. The quality of the hostel makes the students feel like home, and it has both single as well as dual occupancy for students. There is one kitchen on each floor with 24 hours water supply. There are rooms like trading room, library, canteen and grab and go general store. The medical facility is available all the time for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth to join in this college. It has the best and first green school.
reviews.review_text: Our classes are very good, they are well-equipped and maintained. The hostel is very good. We have apartments in every block in which eight people stay with a kitchen and living room. We have a very good view in rainy and winter season. Worth to stay here.

reviews.review_heading: Experienced Faculty and Good Infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college is very good. There is 24*7 electricity supply and hostel rooms are also spacious. There is a huge library in the campus th all types of books. The canteen has excellent food which is very hygienic and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with everything.
reviews.review_text: There are a conference room, trading room, library and canteen in UBS. The quality of the food and the facilities provided in the hostel is satisfactory. Even there is a recreation room and gym facility in our college, and 24 hours of the medical facility is also available here.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Universal AI University

likes.text: Companies like HDFC, CCD, Bajaj, Karvy, and Kantar visit our college for placements.
The college is very supportive in case of placement as it provides extra placement classes for students to get prepared for the industry.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: UBS provides advanced infrastructure facilities like library, sports facilities and gymnasiums for the students.
The campus is accompanied with free Wi-Fi, gymnasium, air-conditioned rooms with furniture, well furnished classes and everything else that you can look for in a college.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teaching is amazing with teachers having lots of experience in studies and in corporate world also.
They design curriculum in this way that anyone can learn and enhance their skills.

likes.text: Currently pursuing my MBA here, I owe a ton to UBS.
UBS not always focuses on studies but always want its students to excel in every area like coordinating events, interacting with top CEOs, etc.

college_info.college_name: Universal AI University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Universal AI University is not very costly. The university fee is quite affordable, hence there is no need for scholarships. The total fee for the two-year Executive MBA is INR 1.98 lakh. This fee is less than many top MBA colleges. For other details, please visit the official website of the university.
Universal AI University provide Scholarships (upto 50% of the tuition fee) and Loan Facility to support students. The different types of scholarships offered by the university are:
Depending on the academic performance, the following scholarships are offered to the students:
Indian Board
International Board Grade
Scholarship upto
30 to 32 33 to 35 36 to 38 39 & above
NOTE:
1) Only one category of special scholarship is applicable per student.
2) Merit Scholarship can not be clubbed with special scholarship.
3) Maximum Scholarship of INR 2,00,000 can be availed per student.
4) Students are eligible for scholarship if their scholarship application is received prior to May.
5) All scholarships are at the sole discretion of Universal AI
6) Eligible students’ will receive a Scholarship Award Letter from the Admissions Team.
Education Loans

The education loan is provided by the following banks: Central Bank of India | Bank of India | State Bank of India | Bank of Baroda | Union Bank of India | Punjab National Bank | Axis Bank | Gyan Dhan | CREDILA – An HDFC Ltd. | AVANSE Education Loans | West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme

The Executive MBA from Universal AI University is a part-time 2-year program. The overall programme cost is INR 1,98,000, with education loan facilities provided. The programme is specifically designed for working professionals in Mumbai. It provides flexibility as well as AI-integrated learning.

Moreover, at the postgraduate level, Desh Bhagat University offers one to two-year MA and MSc, MBA courses to students. The university also offers PG diploma, and PhD courses to students. The flagship programme offered at Desh Bhagat University is the BTech. The university provides this programme to students at UG levels. The university offers the BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Admissions to courses on both UG and PG level are merit as well as entrance based. faqs.answer: A:    The total fee to pursue a BA at DBU varies depending on the choice of specialisation. Thus, the fee ranges from INR 21,100 to INR 3,00,000. Other than this, the fee structure includes other charges such as admission fees, hostel fees, and other charges. faqs.answer: A:    Desh Bhagat University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university considers merit in the last qualifying exam to shortlist students for some of its courses. However, students are also selected based on valid score secured by them in the accepted entrance test. Some of the entrance-based courses are PhD, MBA, BDS, BAMS, etc. Hence, it is not as easy to categorise the university's admission into merit or entrance basis. Applicants can know more about the desired programme by visiting the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Are admissions at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    Desh Bhagat University in Punjab offers an MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) programme that may be regarded as relatively expensive., the average cost of courses at the university is around INR 94,600 each year. Furthermore, the total costs for dental programs such as BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) at Desh Bhagat Dental College & Hospital amount to approximately INR 17.6 lakhs. When these values are compared to the normal range for MDS fees in India, which can range from INR 1,00,000 to INR 10,00,000 per year depending on the institution and specialization, pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University may be somewhat expensive.
faqs.question: Is pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab expensive?

review_content.Placements: This year, 120 students took admission in Desh Bhagat University for a B.Tech in CSE. The placement rate is good, with an average package of 4 LPA, which is good for me. Many companies visit us. The top placement package was 23 LPA, and internships are held.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are cooperative, they always help us. There are hostel facilities provided at a reasonable cost. review_summary.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is actually good, with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. All students get internships. Roles like MO, AMO, and CMO are offered. Others also get some more placements in marketing and are opening their own hospital and clinics. Some students also join the Max and Apollo hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is great. It has Wi-Fi and a canteen. The mess food is good, and AC rooms are available too, with Wi-Fi, and cleaning is done properly. There is no power cut, and generators are available. It provides grounds and sports equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good.

content.Placements: 45 students were placed in my course of Rs.40,000. Our top recruiting companies in India were DR Lal PathLabs Limited, PathCare Diagnostics, AquaProbe Diagnostics, General Diagnostics, CRL Diagnostics, Nobel Diagnostics, SRL Diagnostics, WellCare Diagnostics, and Wellness Diagnostics.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were very good. Our labs, including biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology, were very well maintained, and the laboratory equipment was very well maintained. The canteen food quality was really appreciated, and the game facilities were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Genuine review of Desh Bhagat University.

content.Placements: This year, 120 students took admission in Desh Bhagat University for a B.Tech in CSE. The placement rate is good, with an average package of 4 LPA, which is good for me. Many companies visit us. The top placement package was 23 LPA, and internships are held.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are cooperative, they always help us. There are hostel facilities provided at a reasonable cost. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university and hostel. Classrooms have projectors, and labs are conducted every day. There is a huge library as well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's written that this is a university, but I don't think so because there is not much crowd in BDS.

content.Placements: About 100 students are available in our class, and the fees are taken from 10-12.5 lakh. Management quota fees are around 3 lakh. It is committed, so it is a good university as it is cheap, provides a degree so fast, and on time.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi available, and the labs are not well developed. The classrooms are good, but the library is not good. There are no collections of books. Hostels are good, but the mess food is not good as it is so hard and there is a fluctuation of menu. Sports facilities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is nice.

content.Placements: Placements are not too good here in this course. Not many companies come here to hire students for work from this course. Students have to apply by themselves for some extra choices. Mostly 40 to 50 percent of students get jobs. The package is around 20 to 30 thousand per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is superb as there are so many buildings in good condition with well-maintained washrooms. The college campus has several gardens. It has different types of labs and a library also. The hostel also has a ground for playing and sitting. Mess food is also nice.

admission_overview.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Courses & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Desh Bhagat University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Desh Bhagat University admission 2025is both entrance and merit-based. Formally known asDBU, it is a private university located in Punjab.Desh Bhagat Universityoffers programmes at various UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses in various streams such asScience, Law,Management, Teaching &Education, Design,IT & Software, Nursing,Arts, Engineering, and more. The university also has an international campus in Kenya. Candidates need to clear the entrance exam conducted by the university to get admission at Desh Bhagat University.

Desh Bhagat University admissions for PhD programme are over. However, students can apply for the UG and PG courses. All of the courses at Desh Bhagat University are offered through regular mode. Find below the key highlights forDesh Bhagat University admissions 2025:
Desh Bhagat UniversityHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode/ Online
Programmes offered
40+ (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG, PhD, Diploma
Popular programmes
BSc| MSc| MBA| BTech
Download brochure

Students are accepted into the programmes offered at Desh Bhagat University on both merit and entrance basis. The university offers a variety of specialisations for its courses. The university conducts its own entrance-cum scholarship test;DSBETfor certain programmes. Additionally, it also accepts national and state-level exams such as NEET, and CUET as well. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for the courses offered atDesh Bhagat University courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% in Science stream from a recognised board

NEET|Punjab NEET

The admissions to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses are conducted on the basis of the merits scored in the last qualifying examination and the entrance exam conducted by the Desh Bhagat University i.e. DSBET. The university also accepts various national-level entrance exams for some of its courses. Interested students who fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the university need to follow the below-mentioned steps to complete theadmission process at Desh Bhagat University:
Step 1: Desh Bhagat University Application Process 2025

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website of Desh Bhagat University to fill out the application form online. The candidates need to select the desired course, pay the application fee and upload the specified documents to complete the registration. The candidates will have to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university.
Step 2: Desh Bhagat University Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the relevant entrance exams. For certain courses and specialisations, merit in the last qualifying exam is also taken into consideration.
Step 3: Desh Bhagat University Counselling and Fee Payment

The shortlisted candidates will then be called in for counselling based on which seats will be allotted. Once the seats have been allotted the students will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to complete the admission process.

placement_report.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Desh Bhagat University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: According to the official data available, the overall highest package offered during Desh Bhagat University placements in recent past stood at INR 2.36 Crore per Annum. Earlier, a total of 856 students were placed out of 2,234 students during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022. Further, the highest and average package offered during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022 stood at INR 8.00 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA , respectively. Apart from this, 52 campus recruitment process and 10 On and Off campus drives were held during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022. The top recruiters of Desh Bhagat University in 2022 included leading companies such as Infosys, IBM and PepsiCo. Other than this, according to Desh Bhagat University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Desh Bhagat University UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.4 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during Desh Bhagat University PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.8 LPA.

faqs.question: How strong is the Desh Bhagat University placements cell?
faqs.answer: Desh Bhagat University extends training and placement support to its students. The university has an established placement cell that looks after the on-campus placements. It plays a liaison role between the students and companies. Moreover, many placement-related activities are conducted at DBU. Following is a list of placement activities conducted at the university: Industrial Visits: These visits are essential as they help the students understand how industries work in real life. They get to understand the functioning of industries. Guest Lectures: The placement cell arranges Guest Lectures, where industry leaders come to guide students and tell them about prospective career paths. Personality Development Programme: In this programme, the university helps students develop employability skills such as communication, leadership, time management, industry-based skills, and more.

faqs.question: Which skills do I need to acquire while pursuing B.Pharm from Desh Bhagat University to get my dream job?
faqs.answer: BPharm at DBU helps students cultivate an understanding of various topics, such as Medicinal Chemistry, Human Anatomy, Drug Dosage, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Anatomy, Microbiology, and more. However, in today’s competitive world, in addition to theoretical knowledge, students must also pursue various skill-based courses to become industry-ready. Sills are the prerequisite abilities employers need before they hire a candidate. Listed below are the skills required to get a dream job in the Pharmaceutical sector: Drug therapy ability Knowledge of company policies Patient care Outstanding customer service Clinical reasoning Problem-solving skills Interpersonal skills Teamwork skills Empathy Basic care techniques and knowledge Urgent care and emergency care

faqs.question: Which are the top companies that take part of the placement drive at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab?
faqs.answer: The campus recruitment process consists of a written test, group discussion and personal interview.The top placement drives include the top brands according the market. They provide you with decent amount of salary and good experience. Some of these are : Tech Mahindra IDS Infotech Ltd. Web Apex Technologies IACT IBM Global Process Serviceso Tata Teleservices Ltd. Secugenius Security Solutions ShareKhan Ltd Yellow Pages Saber Papers Ltd Reliance HR Service Pvt Ltd India Infoline Ltd Keep hustling.

faqs.answer: The average annual package for B.Tech Civil Engineering students at Desh Bhagat University in Punjab ranges between Rs. 4,00,000 and Rs. 8,00,000. For more detail check the college website or shiksha website.

Desh Bhagat University NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 781866 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Desh Bhagat University BDS cutoff 2025 was 781866 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1133451 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Desh Bhagat University accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. Desh Bhagat University cutoff 2024 was released throughout a few rounds for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff list was released based on the NEET PG rank, choice declared, availability of seats in college and course, and reservation factors. For MDS admission, the last round closing ranks varied between 6673 and 15423 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. hostel_campus.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Desh Bhagat University provides hostels accommodation for both boys and girls.All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.
facilities: The students who complete one year and leave the programme will be awarded a Certificate in Commerce
The students who complete two years/four semesters and leave the programme will be awarded a Diploma in Commerce.
The students who successfully complete three years/six semesters and leave the programme will be awarded a BCom degree
An option is given to the students to continue their education to the Fourth year and those who successfully complete four years/eight semesters will be awarded a BCom (Hons) degree

library.description: The Library is air-conditioned and computerized with an integrated system connected to the Campus Network, providing Internet and e-mail facility to the academic environment / University community. The reference collection of the Library is continuously updated and augmented with the acquisition of CD-ROM databases and access to online databases on the Internet. Online Public Access Catalogue facility is available at the Reference Desk of the Library. OPAC can also be accessed through any terminal on the Campus Network. Library collection can also be searched through Web OPAC. Apart from this the university's Central Library has it's own WEB OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue) for its Library Users so that they can comfortably access the library resources from anywhere and at any time.

reviews.review_heading: The college is actually good, with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is great. It has Wi-Fi and a canteen. The mess food is good, and AC rooms are available too, with Wi-Fi, and cleaning is done properly. There is no power cut, and generators are available. It provides grounds and sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were very good. Our labs, including biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology, were very well maintained, and the laboratory equipment was very well maintained. The canteen food quality was really appreciated, and the game facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of Desh Bhagat University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are cooperative, they always help us. There are hostel facilities provided at a reasonable cost. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university and hostel. Classrooms have projectors, and labs are conducted every day. There is a huge library as well.

reviews.review_heading: It's written that this is a university, but I don't think so because there is not much crowd in BDS.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available, and the labs are not well developed. The classrooms are good, but the library is not good. There are no collections of books. Hostels are good, but the mess food is not good as it is so hard and there is a fluctuation of menu. Sports facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is superb as there are so many buildings in good condition with well-maintained washrooms. The college campus has several gardens. It has different types of labs and a library also. The hostel also has a ground for playing and sitting. Mess food is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college because of faculty, placement rate, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: We got all the facilities available in our university. First of all, I will talk about infrastructure. The infrastructure of our university is the best. Facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, water that is filtered, and attached washrooms. Geysers are also installed. We have all the stationary items available in our university. Bus service is also available, and one thing I want to add is that the campus is ragging-free.

reviews.review_heading: This college is awesome for this course.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is so nice as every building is well maintained.Gardens and parks are also here. Bathrooms are cleaned time to time. Library and various labs are also present. Hostel buildings are also good. Mess food is made with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. It gives a very good campus life as everybody is so nice and friendly.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is awesome as the buildings are in good condition. The campus is very beautiful as gardens and parks are present here. Bathrooms are in good condition and are cleaned time to time. It has a big library and labs are also present. Hostel apartments are also in well-maintained condition. Mess food is also quite good and is made with proper hygiene. Sports facilities are also present with several game equipment.

reviews.review_heading: And the college campus and University are the best of in the university fees structureplacement
reviews.review_text: The faculties are available and the infrastructure all are very good and also wifi available in all universities campus and hostel facilities and class room and library room is also there. The quality of all hostel rooms and wifi facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure with all facilities and qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the Wi-Fi connection is good in the ground and corridors. They provide all facilities, including good labs and resources, and have wonderful classrooms with advanced screening boards. The college offers all medical facilities and provides classes for games, along with tasty canteen food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is nice with friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very beautiful here. We have a beautiful garden and campus area for enjoyment and a study canteen is also available in our college, where we get food items at very affordable prices. Staff are very friendly and helpful in nature. Buildings are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Desh Bhagat University review.
reviews.review_text: The department has classrooms, labs, a library, and wifi. The campus is well-maintained, with lots of trees and plants. There's a well-maintained herbarium with a gardener on staff. The hostel has wifi, indoor and outdoor games, a walking ramp, a gymnasium, and a good mess with snacks and sweets.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best or top universities in Punjab. Desh Bhagat University is NAAC A+.
reviews.review_text: The university provides campus free Wi-Fi with high speed, specialized labs for each department such as computer labs for IT and CS departments. Smart classrooms with projectors, modern seating arrangements, and air conditioning are available. Libraries have vast collections of books, journals, and e-books. Hostels provide well-furnished rooms with beds, study tables, storage space, and AC or cooler available. Mess facilities serve breakfast, lunch, dinner, and evening snacks. The menu is balanc...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for civil engineering is Desh Bhagat University.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure is available in my course department. Classrooms and the campus have Wi-Fi facilities. Students can access the Wi-Fi network after some processes that the Desh Bhagat University IT department can assist with. Hostel facilities are okay. When I was in my 1st year, fewer facilities were provided in the hostel, but this year there has been noticeable improvement in the hostel rooms. The mess is also okay; the food is acceptable, hygienic, but the quality is dull.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best private universities in Punjab at a low fee. Thank you, DBU.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include unlimited Wi-Fi, laboratories, and AC classrooms with 24-hour electricity available in each department. Each department has its own library with many academic and journal books. Hygienic and healthy food is provided in the hostel. Wi-Fi, water coolers, 24-hour electricity, ACs, and coolers are also available in each hostel. There are 7 blocks for boys' hostels and 3 blocks for girls', which are separate from the boys' hostel. Sports activities like cricket, running, and vo...

Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. review_summary.college_name: Kongu Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The way to the success of your life.

content.Placements: 85 to 90 percent top students are placed in top companies. The highest package in my course is 15LPA and the lowest package in my course is 6LPA and the average package offered in my course is 8 to 9LPA. Bahwan CyberTek and Cognizant are the companies recruiting for my course. The college is good for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very neat. Library has all the books and faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi is also available and hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is okay. Good sports games are available in college disciplines and are neat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Kongu Engineering College is good, but this college is located on the outskirts of Erode.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact placement percentage. I think it is around 75% in my department. In my department, the average salary is approximately 3–4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, TCS, ZOHO, Infosys, and Soliton. Service-based roles are a major in my department.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is green and eco-friendly and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. In classrooms, teachers teach on a smartboard. The library is neat and clean, and students maintain silence. There are nearly 7,000 books available, which give knowledge to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Kongu Engineering College is best for infrastructure and good for placement and academics.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are being placed with an average package of 23 LPA, and the lowest package is 5.5 LPA. L&T and Bosch are coming for placement. Around 78 percent of people are getting internships, and all is fine. Team leader and other posts, like manager, are being offered as top positions.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good atmosphere and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In my batch (2024-25) of the AIML course, around 92 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. Top recruiters include Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and TCS. About 85 percent got internships at firms like Infosys, Deloitte, and Accenture. Major roles offered were Software Engineer, Data Analyst, and AI Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped library. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with good food in the mess. Medical, sports, and gym facilities are excellent, and the hostel food is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: An excellent college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and placement.

content.Placements: In 2024, college placement trends showed an impressive outcome with many top institutions achieving placement rates above 90 percent for their graduation batches. The highest salary packages touched 13 LPA, and average offers range from 6 LPA to 6.5 LPA for in-demand courses. Major recruiters include Accenture, Amazon, Infosys, and TCS, reflecting strong industry participation. Internship opportunities also grew with up to 80 percent of students interning at leading firms such as Google and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software development, consulting, product management, and analytics.

admission_process.title: Kongu Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kongu Engineering College offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based except BSc and MSc. Candidates willing to apply for any courses must register for entrance exams and appear for the same.Kongu Engineering Collegeis affiliated with Anna University, However, the college follows the admission norms ofAnna Universityfor admission to B.E./BTech, MBA, MCA and MTech courses. To know the latest information related to Kongu Engineering College admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Kongu Engineering College admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers both entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. The college offers UG, PG, and PhD courses, including BTech/B.E., M.E./MTech, MCA, MBA, BSc and others.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college acceptsTNEA counsellingscores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc courses college offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Want to know other details aboutKEC- Kongu Engineering College courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:

Kongu Engineering College's admission process includes filling out the application form qualifying for the selection rounds and paying the fee to grab the final seat. Check below the detailed steps of Kongu Engineering College admission 2025:
STEP 1: Kongu Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TANCET, GATE andCEETAfor admission to PG courses. Additionally, for admission to BTech/ B.E. candidates are required to register and appear for TNEA Counselling.
STEP 2: Kongu Engineering College Selection Round

Kongu Engineering College selects candidates forBTech/ B.E.., MBA,MCAand M.E. based on entrance exams along with counselling such as TNEA Counselling, TANCET, GATE and CEETA entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theKongu Engineering College feeto complete their enrollment within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

faqs.question: Are admissions to Kongu Engineering College open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission is open to Kongu Engineering College for all UG, PG and PhD courses through TNEA, GATE, CEETA and TANCET, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc, candidates are selected based on the last qualifying exam score. Interested candidates can visit the official websites of TNEA Counselling and TANCET to apply for the BTech and PG courses, respectively.

faqs.question: What are the top courses offered at Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The college offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels such as B.E./BTech, MCA, MBA M.E./ MTech, BSc and others. Candidates who have completed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. Graduation is required to apply for the PG courses. Additionally, candidates, need to appear for TNEA counselling for admission to B.E./BTech and CEETA-PG/GATE, and TANCET for admission to MTech, MBA, MCA courses, respectively.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kongu Engineering College ccepts various entrance exams for admission to UG and PG courses. The college offers two UG i.e., BTech/B.E. and BSc and four PG courses i.e., M.E., MCA, MBA and MSc. For admission to BSc and MSc, the college offers merit-based admission. Further, the college accepts TNEA counselling for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE, and CEETA for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. After filling out the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply to the official website of their respective entrance exam and fill out the admission form.

description: KEC - Kongu Engineering College cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the KEC - Kongu Engineering College cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

KEC - Kongu Engineering College TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 1805 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

KEC - Kongu Engineering College MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 1805 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2544.

KEC - Kongu Engineering College accepts the TANCET cutoff for admissions to various specialisation of MBA/PGDM. Students who are interested in admissions at this institute can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding registration, exam, etc.

TANCET 2025 cutoff for KEC - Kongu Engineering College is available in the table below, along with last two years cutoff data.The cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students preparing for admission can download the consollidated round and year-wise cutoff data to understand the cutoff trends.

Students can view the KEC - Kongu Engineering College BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at KEC - Kongu Engineering College was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 20273.

reviews.review_heading: The way to the success of your life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very neat. Library has all the books and faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi is also available and hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is okay. Good sports games are available in college disciplines and are neat.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is good, but this college is located on the outskirts of Erode.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and eco-friendly and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. In classrooms, teachers teach on a smartboard. The library is neat and clean, and students maintain silence. There are nearly 7,000 books available, which give knowledge to students.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is best for infrastructure and good for placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped library. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with good food in the mess. Medical, sports, and gym facilities are excellent, and the hostel food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Modern colleges in 2025 offer comprehensive facilities for students, including campus-wide Wi-Fi, advanced computer labs, fully equipped classrooms with audio-visual aids, and libraries stocked with contemporary books and digital resources. Hostels are designed to be comfortable, featuring clean rooms, recreational space, night canteens, and amenities such as laundry services and a gymnasium. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is generally regarded as hygienic and varied, with regular m...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and an industry-ready AIML curriculum with excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: AIML facilities include smart classrooms with projectors, Wi-Fi, specialized AI/ML labs with GPUs, software like TensorFlow/PyTorch, a library, and seminar halls. The hostel has good quality with Wi-Fi, adequate mess food (hygiene maintained), a medical center, sports complex, gym, and indoor/outdoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty staffs because of the use of rude behavior.
reviews.review_text: Food technology department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a good library. Hostel, mess, and canteen offer quality food and hygienic stay. Medical, sports, and recreational facilities are good, ensuring student well-being and comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facility is available with a sports ground. Food available is good. It has good communication.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College - Best college in Erode.
reviews.review_text: Multi facility hostel is there with good food and hygiene. It has Wi-Fi covered campus with good connectivity. A big playground is there with 2,00,000 books. Gym and dispensary are there. Classrooms are equipped with digital boards and good cleanliness. Quality of food is really good, and wardens are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College has best infrastructure and good for placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground, and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money in college.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is the best infrastructure and good placement academic.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. A good hostel facility is available with a sports ground, and the food is really good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but some idiots.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but Wi-Fi is not that great, and you can't access social media through their internet. I am a dayscholar but heard the hostel food is very average but very hygienic. Hostel timings are very strict, but rooms are cleaned often and laundry is available for extra cash.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College has the best infrastructure and is good for placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many types of equipment. Wi-Fi is available all around the campus, and a big library is provided. A good-facility hostel is available with a sports ground, and the food provided is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, recommended for others.
reviews.review_text: KEC is spread over about 167 acres of land. Built-up area (in one report) is 22.45 Lacs sq ft. Academic & IT Facilities: Classrooms: 186-200 classrooms (various reports: 186 in 2022-23). Laboratories: 135 state-of-the-art labs. Wi-Fi in classrooms.

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 54,000 - 4,95,600 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad.

individual_reviews.title: My college is good. You can get a nice faculty to communicate with.

content.Placements: Its about 50 percent are placed students. The highest will be up to 10 LPA and the lowest will be 30k. Its Edudiango Pvt Ltd, Bangalore, AICTE, Net Leap solutions. Its about 60 percent of students are place and the companies are Cyber Sanskar Nashik, Paarsh, Jingle Toon. Its Data Analytics, Software Developed, Full Space Web Development.
content.Infrastructure: In the classroom, there is a projector. The projector will be presented through a laptop and it is very easy to understand the concept and logic through the projector. The facility of Wi-Fi connection is the best for students. In the virtual labs, there are computers and a projector. There is a library too and in that library there are so many types of books. The food quality is so good. Every food item is so tasty to eat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review by a genuine student of MIT CSN.

content.Placements: The placement is not good, likely it's average, you can get a maximum of 12 LPA. The average placement is not the college's fault, they are responsible for that.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is large, green, and well-equipped with labs, Wi-Fi, a library, sports facilities, and hostels. That's all.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly and helpful Faculty members are generally described as knowledgeable, supportive, and experienced with quality teaching and regular tests. That's the real truth of college.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in all aspects.

content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed in college is nearly about 20%. The placement is not big in this college. In recent years the packages have not gotten big the highest package is about 4 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA for the job but not many students get these jobs. They get the internship for Rs. 10,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are two big buildings for this college. The college campus is very big at least 10 to 15 acres. admission_process.title: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad Admission process 2025

paragraphs: MIT Aurangabad admission 2025 is entrance-based.Maharashtra Institute of Technology (MIT), Aurangabad offers a range ofUG, PG, andPhDlevel courses includingBTech, MTech, MBA, and BVoc. Usually, admission toMITbegins inMayand the new academic yearstarts in July. Admission to the courses is based onnational and state-levelentrance exams. Students can take admission through centralcounsellingconducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE)/State CET Cell, Mumbai, or directly at the institute level.

All the courses at the institute are offered under its nine departments. The institute provides scholarships and fee discounts to students from a minority community or getting admissionthrough CAP. Registration areopenfor UG and PG courses offered by the institute.
Students canregister online. The institute provides admissionsdirectlythrough acentralised admission process(CAP).Below mentioned are MITAurangabad coursesand fees:
Course Name
Eligibility
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
MHT CET/JEE Main
BTech Lateral Entry
Three-years diploma in Engineering/ Technology with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Class 12 or diploma in Science and equivalent
Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
MAH MBA/ MMS CET/GMAT/CAT/MAT/ATMA/XAT/CMAT
Master’s degree
*The above-mentioned figures might change subject to directives from the concerned Govt. Regulating Authorities.

The institute placement begins in July in the pre-final and goes on till the end of the academic year. The highest package offered to students was INR 12.2 lakh in the Maharashtra Institute of Technology 2020 placement.

MIT-WPU Application Process
Students need to fill out an online application form on the official website of MIT-Aurangabad with all the relevant information.
Entrance Exam, Result & Counselling

After filling out the MIT registration form, students must appear MIT entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds. Based on the entrance exam scores results will be declared on the official website of MIT and a merit list will be prepared through a counselling process.
Fee Payment
A provisional offer letter will be provided to students based on their performance in the selection rounds. Those who receive the offer letter will have to make the first fee installment.
Declaration of Final Offer Letter
The university releases the final offer letter after the completion of document verification. The University sends the offer letter to the student's registered email address. In the last

faqs.question: Are admission dates out for MBA at Maharashtra Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad MBA admission datesfor the academic year 2025 is not yet. Candidates can refer to the accepted exam's dates for 2025. The institute will release its in-house date soon. As of the now, the MIT has released the admission enquiry form for admission 2025.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in Maharashtra Institute of Technology MBA course without MAH MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission in theMaharashtra Institute of Technology MBA coursewithoutMaharashtra Common Entrance Test or MAH CET, since the institute accepts multiple other national and state-level entrance exams for its MBA course. Candidates can go for theCAT/ MMS CET/ GMAT/ MAT/ ATMA/ XAT/ CMAT, etc., exams for MBA admission. Interested students can apply for the MBA course with a valid exam score and qualifications.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Companies such as T etra Pak, Tech Mahindra and Reliance Industries Ltd visited the campus during MIT Aurangabad placements 2024. Moreover, according to the information brochure 2023-24 released by Maharashtra Institute of Technology, the highest package offered during MIT Aurangabad placements in recent past stood at INR 80 LPA . Apart from this, according to NIRF report 2024 released by the Institute, the median package offered during MIT Aurangabad UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 2.95 LPA , respectively.
